subject: Officially

body:
43rd year in a row

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9c788ca9aca34467ad30e0aba5111821&_e=nKHq-RJdqzsSjWCCi7RsvH5vSMVXa2HcFZI5q3aphRLtC1nnaaF5-pkMi75-wghZhcmGtbjKsSG59XDA--dyRgp5nDdFX5EsIQcrXFdV0EfuvvAPnAgB90X4IcXHnlMNFkb2zL_LSAByEAMeS1yOPkB7AQjXZg6Zuuel-iV6204GVHfl5Ap-BW-OjskY5RfFvouI_MKsBzFJOCO3EMmgCCW3FnzUbytW_3yxN0qlovbxCYea6oQhxQUsFMtRerZ78ZLc_d5ZTkvni3W6z2ckYa-l7EbFroE_fMUIJtRpkqJqFBY7VcTQ6BIj4STCLG8fm2_-86KwVuWdCTA8KgQNtN3TgNEGO2onffsxfarIDA6hyqiIwyYsqk_Y0XxR4YzKgMwtS0yfMjr4q1uTzhbPzVFHMFNXrJNkff2jdMKcv9KKOa7hPEerBzMMPHpGVhdV0Enrzmtk6meeB-cqAB7PAMihBpXrvu0DKLtxbj7XGwE%3D)
---
Hey everyone,

My 43rd year in a row of 99 county meetings is officially underway. Every county, every year.

I place a high priority on holding dialogue with Iowans across the state, two-way communication is the essence of representative government. **_[Chip in to help fuel my grassroots discussions.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9c788ca9aca34467ad30e0aba5111821&_e=nKHq-RJdqzsSjWCCi7RsvH5vSMVXa2HcFZI5q3aphRLtC1nnaaF5-pkMi75-wghZhcmGtbjKsSG59XDA--dyRgp5nDdFX5EsIQcrXFdV0EfuvvAPnAgB90X4IcXHnlMNFkb2zL_LSAByEAMeS1yOPkB7AQjXZg6Zuuel-iV6204GVHfl5Ap-BW-OjskY5RfFvouI_MKsBzFJOCO3EMmgCCW3FnzUbytW_3yxN0qlovbxCYea6oQhxQUsFMtRerZ78ZLc_d5ZTkvni3W6z2ckYa-l7EbFroE_fMUIJtRpkqJqFBY7VcTQ6BIj4STCLG8fm2_-86KwVuWdCTA8KgQNtIQ2lpWjGkioBcoh51Ti-pgNrDeFKS7h-u50XhbijrIJ9GnXF3EaaU838G0hmLLA2yijamT7hX6NEKKM-GJOHAgtg9lHNGmh0aRaQotKPZ_uhqBkLC37yNNuSFSUEYd2yyHeVseOKsnCBNWrGlw-B_8%3D)_**

I recently visited the Dallas Center-Grimes High School to get some insight from our country's future generations.

Barbara and I have five kids, nine grandchildren, and eleven great-grandchildren. I'm -- working as hard as ever to ensure future generations have the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. Getting straddled with debt to the tune of $31 trillion is fiscally irresponsible, and that's why I support a constitutional Balanced Budget Amendment.

**_[Chip in if you agree we need to pass a Balanced Budget Amendment.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9c788ca9aca34467ad30e0aba5111821&_e=nKHq-RJdqzsSjWCCi7RsvH5vSMVXa2HcFZI5q3aphRLtC1nnaaF5-pkMi75-wghZhcmGtbjKsSG59XDA--dyRgp5nDdFX5EsIQcrXFdV0EfuvvAPnAgB90X4IcXHnlMNFkb2zL_LSAByEAMeS1yOPkB7AQjXZg6Zuuel-iV6204GVHfl5Ap-BW-OjskY5RfFvouI_MKsBzFJOCO3EMmgCCW3FnzUbytW_3yxN0qlovbxCYea6oQhxQUsFMtRerZ78ZLc_d5ZTkvni3W6z2ckYa-l7EbFroE_fMUIJtRpkqJqFBY7VcTQ6BIj4STCLG8fm2_-86KwVuWdCTA8KgQNtCbdnanTCA66EiH_pJyIVVWBxLf5SvyXis-blmHtvFwccKrcqlSbVRaG4m7LExjnUbTIfaqba-MgTKXEwLZ0CK7KYBHc9Nei72_aeuYN-8Bd9odjuH6CFxWwPI41SJ44MkF-IX2ejUXe-QLUBtESuz4%3D)_
**
I love talking with each and every single Iowan and look forward to holding meetings in every county across the state. **[_Chip in today. Your support helps me do what I do best -- representing the incredible people of Iowa across our great state._](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9c788ca9aca34467ad30e0aba5111821&_e=nKHq-RJdqzsSjWCCi7RsvH5vSMVXa2HcFZI5q3aphRLtC1nnaaF5-pkMi75-wghZhcmGtbjKsSG59XDA--dyRgp5nDdFX5EsIQcrXFdV0EfuvvAPnAgB90X4IcXHnlMNFkb2zL_LSAByEAMeS1yOPkB7AQjXZg6Zuuel-iV6204GVHfl5Ap-BW-OjskY5RfFvouI_MKsBzFJOCO3EMmgCCW3FnzUbytW_3yxN0qlovbxCYea6oQhxQUsFMtRerZ78ZLc_d5ZTkvni3W6z2ckYa-l7EbFroE_fMUIJtRpkqJqFBY7VcTQ6BIj4STCLG8fm2_-86KwVuWdCTA8KgQNtJO6EYiS0c16zVJWbv72mH-ES72my0e7C3hyk3BZ7y6WLqHHBGr2lv-hm0rJ5rIyKgN4PdGIYD8sosSo5a7JyRgEkx4qIQ4I-wgMGwfwPPpWpWwhy8hzaPSz8J3iDOy1BEtCOSKO2calciXCuU0n-Ms%3D)**

All my best,
Chuck

_P.S. The ice cream I had at Freddy 's in Grimes was delicious, and meeting young Iowans was even better.
_

| Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

subject: My message to you

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373229/390871154/1458708009?refcode=EM_FR_230206KC_N_KC_FULL_9_G_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQxZTc0NS03ZWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N_lJUQekPJ844NVLpzgmLWpm37klnoeyeF1UAapVfE=) Hello friends,

It’s Katherine Clark and I recently was sworn in as the new Democratic Whip. I wanted to send you this email and share my thoughts as we make our way through this new session together.

[**And if you want to help Democrats achieve our goals in 2023, then I hope you will send in a donation to support Jennifer Wexton and my leadership organization Fair Shot PAC today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373230/390871155/1458708009?refcode=EM_FR_230206KC_N_KC_FULL_9_G_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQxZTc0NS03ZWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N_lJUQekPJ844NVLpzgmLWpm37klnoeyeF1UAapVfE=)

It certainly has been a chaotic start to the 118th Congress. In just the first week, I had to whip 15 rounds of votes for Speaker of the House - and I’m so proud that Democrats have remained united despite the Republican infighting.

However, it’s clear the next year is going to come with many challenges. Democrats are being kicked off our committees and MAGA Republicans now have more power over Congress than they may have ever had before.

**It’s up to us to stand up to their extremism and make sure things are still getting done for the American people.**

For me, this is about protecting our democracy and making a real difference in people’s lives.

I know this won’t be easy, but with your support, I believe we can live up to our greatest potential and there is nothing we cannot achieve if we put our minds to it.

[**That’s why I’m asking you to please join me by making a generous donation to support Jennifer Wexton and Fair Shot PAC today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373231/390871156/1458708009?refcode=EM_FR_230206KC_N_KC_FULL_9_G_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQxZTc0NS03ZWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N_lJUQekPJ844NVLpzgmLWpm37klnoeyeF1UAapVfE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Fair Shot PAC and Jennifer Wexton:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373232/390871157/1458708009?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230206KC_N_KC_FULL_9_G_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTQxZTc0NS03ZWE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N_lJUQekPJ844NVLpzgmLWpm37klnoeyeF1UAapVfE=)**

name: Katie Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58373319/390873750/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230206_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUwZmY5M2YtN2ZhNi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dRe7XEw34_O31yudMEIPNNkt03TBA4RKO4XIjWuUAwQ=)
---
**$13.27.** That was our average online donation last month, Peter, and I couldn’t be prouder of that number. $13.27 may seem like small to the billionaires and super PACs that prop up so many of our elected officials. And it’s pocket change to the corporate special interest groups who pay to ensure their CEOs keep their tax loopholes and huge salaries. But $13.27 multiplied over and over by every single person reading this email starts to add up — and that’s the power of a grassroots team. We’ll never have the deep pockets to go toe to toe with the wealthy forces who control our politics alone. subject: We knew this was coming

body:
| | | Peter,
---
It was only a matter of time.

America is about to hit its debt ceiling AGAIN, and Democrats want to add TRILLIONS more to the national debt without ANY fiscal reforms.
It’s irresponsible, it’s insane, and it’s downright stupid - but the Left just doesn’t care.
**In fact, now they’re attacking Republicans who are taking a stand to REFUSE to add more debt unless we start to get our fiscal house in order.**
_Enough is enough._
It’s time to pay down our debt and start being responsible with our money, but Republicans need YOUR help.
[**Join us today and STAND STRONG against the Democrats’ out-of-control debt and spending.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=88595801e2484781b74caea6f9d4e27f&_e=y2nWPuATyTSOv0lDZ286Hz_XtEDs_DSWKwP2AYwEc78itnDLeaMuSjMgaZLmaqlK-n9Mx0mewSS6jPPafMD2KZuTyVMznFLPjL1x-L8FmwG2qOr98pzHrgZvw1Odi5I1A-Y3L1M9JXi6i7bmAY-7HMRWzdr7VOLubk-7DnbjHQGsHd3odfzp9DJJ6p3Dw3nBcWOtHQROnTDy0dEltbOkGWUSY6G-W34GICSfodovZSq2FnXC4BZdJcaIH-0yDrPmSrem7hYU4CdKmn-tyr0khyVcmG09gwk7QetpPICJbzhuVrzE7A8tnrI7XtlaYUwh87hiHgRTHZl4nIhSnmme-GNj5uOumfMeOPsHYhcjiBH5rqshlTAmPLVFQ21yvYd9)

| | Peter, the consequences of our national debt are going to be _devastating._

We’re leaving our children and grandchildren to pay down over **31 TRILLION DOLLARS **\- and that number is only growing.

It should be common sense: when you’re drowning in debt you make tough choices, cut back on spending, and pay down what you owe.

But common sense is in short supply for Senate Democrats, and they’ll have us crushed under trillions more in debt.

[**It’s time for America to get responsible again. clean_body: | | | Peter, It was only a matter of time. America is about to hit its debt ceiling AGAIN, and Democrats want to add TRILLIONS more to the national debt without ANY fiscal reforms. It’s irresponsible, it’s insane, and it’s downright stupid - but the Left just doesn’t care. In fact, now they’re attacking Republicans who are taking a stand to REFUSE to add more debt unless we start to get our fiscal house in order. Enough is enough. It’s time to pay down our debt and start being responsible with our money, but Republicans need YOUR help. | | | | Peter, the consequences of our national debt are going to be devastating. We’re leaving our children and grandchildren to pay down over 31 TRILLION DOLLARS \- and that number is only growing. It should be common sense: when you’re drowning in debt you make tough choices, cut back on spending, and pay down what you owe. But common sense is in short supply for Senate Democrats, and they’ll have us crushed under trillions more in debt. Thank you, Senate Conservatives | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: we did it
body:
|
---
| | The bill passed out of committee with a unanimous YES!

Again, [Senate Bill 1029](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=3569fc4770&e=dea908e0fe "see the bill") amends and adds to existing law to prohibit a child protection investigation based on a child's immunization status and to provide that a court shall not grant an order terminating a parent and child relationship based on a child's immunization status.

This is good news for Idaho.

But we're not out of the woods yet, there are still several more hoops to jump through...

The next stop is the Senate floor then it gets sent over to the House, and hopefully, the Governor.

So if you have a sec, can you please **[email the Senate Judiciary& Rules committee members](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b7316b60e9&e=dea908e0fe)** and tell them _**THANK YOU**_ for voting to move this bill forward in the process?

Email the committee -->**[it's one-click easy](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=de03ac8390&e=dea908e0fe "one click, one message, easy-peasy")**.

Thanks for being in the fight,

Brian

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Take Action: stand with restaurant workers paying for their own exploitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1011&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1012&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]TAKE ACTION: CALL YOUR REPS!

Hi Peter Willis,

Congressman Ro Khanna here with breaking news and an important action you
can take right now — because corporate lobbying to crush workers has
reached a sickening new low.

The NY Times exposed how the National Restaurant Association (AKA the
‘other NRA’) forces tipped workers to chip in $15 for a required class
then deploys their own money to lobby to keep their wages low!

They are literally forcing restaurant workers to fund their own
exploitation, and we're fighting back with everything we have.

That’s why I signed the Pledge to Reject NRA-Pac Money — and why we need
my colleagues in Congress to do the same!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1013&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Our Revolution is teaming up with One Fair Wage to take on the NRA and
Raise the Wage. You can help by calling your representatives to sign a
pledge to reject NRA-PAC money?

It’s because of the Other NRA’s massive lobbying that restaurant workers
earn far below a living wage — the federal tipped minimum wage has been
$2.13 an hour for over 30 years!

As these workers are mandated to pay $15 for a class ostensibly about
"food safety,” that money is going right to the NRA — effectively making
workers fund their own economic exploitation.

We all need to fight for economic justice, and that’s why I’m proud to
stand with Our Revolution and grassroots activists to empower workers
nationwide. It will take action on the inside and on the outside to
outflank the lobbyists.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8246?t=1014&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]I hope you’ll take action today to stand with restaurant workers and
call on your representatives to sign a pledge to reject NRA-PAC money!

Our work with Our Revolution and workers in 2022 successfully helped pass
sectoral bargaining for fast food workers with AB 257 in my state of
California, and we increased NLRB funding by $25M to take on union
busters. This is a start.

Now, I’m excited to see Our Revolution partnering with One Fair Wage to
pass higher wages in TEN states in 2023 — and work to get higher wages on
the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1015&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]There’s a lot of exciting work ahead and you can help kick it all off
by calling your Reps today!

When we organize, we win.

Congressman Ro Khanna

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230206_EN_fairwage_2_3MO_RoKhanna_NA_NA_fairwage.DUoH7M&t=1008&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2023 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230206_EN_fairwage_2_3MO_RoKhanna_NA_NA_fairwage.hvgOSk&t=1009&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230206_EN_fairwage_2_3MO_RoKhanna_NA_NA_fairwage.Flt94V&t=1010&akid=3977%2E5885482%2Estts88 ]GIVE ONCE

| But it won’t just be _my_ response... I will be speaking on behalf of every American citizen who has been crushed by the most incompetent and corrupt presidency in history.

| _**That’s why I’m asking for YOUR input as I put together my official State of the Union response.**_

| Biden will give his speech just days after he brought SHAME upon our country.
---
| The Chinese Spy Balloon situation was a DISGRACE, just like the Afghanistan horror show, and everything else surrounding the grossly incompetent Biden-Harris Administration.
---
| China would NEVER have floated the Balloon over the United States if I were President – _and everybody knows it._
---
| **But with Biden and Kamala running the show, the entire world is laughing at us. **
---

Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.

**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**

I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.

The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.

Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.

I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.

**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**

The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.

What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.

We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:

[Will you split a contribution — of $10 or any amount you can — between our campaign and The Collective PAC so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJek-flnMsPgjA54l48qU4VgOILAaFlqRY1JYkc6zHcuju8_w7idKTdkZnWqmabEqoTzigRnQ412A8cUgYNbowxKb2e9f1uqK9_8VfU1j9gzSRJoEPaCkh_i_hHT7Omj5Ry4hw-E5q7iCD3MiAIS_3BhBb8vJjhzCmBtaKX_hdAcMFmhtJX4W7CfCqqF2Zg6NnxuxY6d4Bd9ShiGNmakRG-S0L83QZ967qyXVwOEDdWAgllO7ExfSSoq_VhGQnuDboWoXvjRi36EZ-jyHjpHmqcxZPFFe1sdST-cOCzpq7QlIyPkXYG2OX6DO-Tg8FY2kz9GtH9hIebv-nBxJidpfSaatphtZZhQ_CGz7JV3wfEXs/3ti/Ra2GD818Soe31Jsp75-CWQ/h2/AYeSYJphP0_6QPT-zeSCnjkvX7tzhVTiz5sAJbiWr5U) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Ilhan Omar and The Collective PAC.

Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.

From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.

Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter. After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee. I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected. The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family. Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad. I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen. My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment. The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world. What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country. We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Ilhan Omar and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Gonzalez=2C=20Communications=20Director?=
subject: Email Democrats - Restore Police Pursuits!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help us get SB 5352 through the Senate Law and Justice Committee

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:
\- - - | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6a44949e32d/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8115839?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=92c61710cb&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_I am writing you today not only as your representative but as a concerned citizen._
**In the last year, we have seen the devastating toll that fentanyl has taken on our community, claiming a life every 5 minutes. This is a public health emergency that demands our urgent attention and action.**
[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=cba2e60b40&e=c87c5d8d97)

I have been working tirelessly to address this crisis and stop the flow of fentanyl from our Southern border – But I need your help to continue this fight.

Your support will allow me to maintain my efforts to combat the fentanyl crisis and make a real impact in our community.

[_**Peter , will you join my fight to address the devastating impacts of fentanyl in our community? Your contribution will help me keep up the fight against fentanyl and the crisis at our southern border. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=336faef357&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=478fcf257d&e=c87c5d8d97 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY")
---
| Together we will protect our nation and keep our communities safe!

Thank you, [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=b280d71a49&e=c87c5d8d97)
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05

name: Right Wing Report
subject: CHUCK NORRIS: Is Your Money Safe?
body:
unsubscribe

Dear Patriot,
Below is an important sponsored message for
your consideration. Messages like these enable us to continue
bringing you the latest news at no cost.
Courtesy of Right Wing Report

Banks Could Seize Your Accounts

There Are No More Bailouts. This
is how banks could legally confiscate your deposits without your
permission. Learn More

The End of the Dollar...

The future of this country is
under assault like nothing we've seen before. The Feds new secret
"Project Hamilton" will obliterate freedom in America. Learn
More

Government to close the biggest
tax loophole

The IRS is trying to close the
tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market
crashes and recessions. Learn More

The Feds's Digital Dollar Is
Here!
It is official. The digital
dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on
Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New
York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed
are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.

Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and
Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in
the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is
called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.

How will that affect you and your
finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy
whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely
the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily
diminishing your purchasing power. Learn more.

Our government will know what you
have, where you have it, and how you are spending it. This is the
ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the
way you spend your money unless obtaining their approval at
first.

Therefore, your money is no
longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a
fraction of what it is worth today.

They are all in cahoots.
Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are
not in a "Financial Rat-Lab". Enough is Enough, we have suffered
greatly.

Time is no longer on your side,
and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset
is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is
underway.

You shouldn't have to work as
hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.

Whether you love or hate gold and
silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer
you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is
role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance,
preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential
profit making. Get more information.

There has never been a more
urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it.
Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement
wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit
back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your
retirement.

The time on missing on great
opportunities is over. Act today! Explore, 100% free, how gold
inside your retirement can significantly improve your future
wealth.

Call (844) 790-9191 or simply
click here to receive all the essential information tailored
specifically to your needs.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Did You Miss It Last Night?!?
body:
Did You Miss It Last Night? Last night, Roger Stone joined me for Pastor's For Trump's February National Prayer Call and it was a BLAST! Watch it he
| | |
---
## Did You Miss It Last Night?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10294.1.368e937da9318d81b2f0ff0f4ad10991)
---
Last night, **Roger Stone** joined me for [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10295.1.2e8124526ef109438d2b1bc10f09ddf9)'s February National Prayer Call and it was a **BLAST**!
Watch it here: [National Prayer Call w/Roger Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10296.1.f97aeb7b75204d942653c880050b8368)
**Mr. Stone** shared his **INCREDIBLE Testimony of what Jesus has done** in his life as well as providing us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House. Mr. Stone also shared how grateful **President Donald Trump** is for the efforts of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10297.1.92096ad73142bf5116b860c84a7daba8).
Not only that but **Mr. Stone** has offered to have a **PRIVATE ZOOM CALL** with 5 supporters of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10298.1.b74b14e13faea7975a63192884cd5e51).
On this zoom call you can **ask Mr. Stone ANYTHING!** I suggest the topics of the **JFK assassination** and **Watergate** , both of which **Mr. Stone** has tremendous insight.
To enter for a chance to be a part of the **PRIVATE zoom call with Mr. Stone** all you have to do is make a donation of $10 to [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10299.1.652a403bd835ddecac3f7702d723ab0d).
We will do a raffle among our donors and _5 winners will be selected_.
For every $10 donated it will result in 1 entry into the raffle. Ex. $20 = 2 entries.
You can support [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10300.1.cd86e0efabd6b973306b650fedb7c9b7) by visiting [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10301.1.39aac7a0c9fdfdf42ffae99d9bd1072f)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10302.1.5f572796bf7add509a70525dac30d441), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10303.1.d774fcfc1c1d4742988949388cdaa99d), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10304.1.896765992315f114b15e1b128e4d359f), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10305.1.744a580b0dd36d116b72dcc0264eadc8), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10306.1.2553bb9b323b69ad0bcef3fc314a3b6e) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10307.1.9f75a0efb7d42145da6bbaadb894e839)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10308.1.989d08d6976b94a2c559a56678489674)
| | [ Support Pastor's For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10309.1.e27b98bc7afbd7cf9354104c996a04d8)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10310.1.c8c9f159aa2004d854a734c6a07f66bf)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10311.1.32d28f8e29d1f4907d578d0d4e7ed43f) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10312.1.e470552573d0131dd2a556550b99b464)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10313.1.8d681c50dafa2e44278362d87a2505fd) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10314.1.6bc344f2f7028c0ba9e0eed049f3f711) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10315.1.33cd6ef32c422099059d25c8981d0c8a) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10316.1.ceec3ec3d0774c373158452a805c4a8a) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10317.1.3f8cbf2c54e8333de5e722129b2aff47) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10318.1.dc4588a757c4225a3fc35ff06cff56b7) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
## Sheridan.Church Is Coming To OKC!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10319.1.e0a59840887e9563713b2449e2334f6b)
---
**I am excited to announce** that [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10320.1.1b31b92731b8f15caa6b95911c4c060e) in Tulsa, OK is launching a **new campus in Oklahoma City!**
If you or someone you know lives in the OKC Metro and is searching for a Church Home, then I want to invite you to join me for a [Interest Meet & Greet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10321.1.5c2977a67a2a1ccf94da380c6075c2f8).
**Date** : Saturday, February 25, 2023
**Time** : 5:00 - 6:30 pm
**Location** : 2222 W. Hefner Rd. Oklahoma City, OK 73120
**RSVP** : [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/846320](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10322.1.fc210f81e951e73f404213b088e72a06)
To learn more about [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10323.1.548ab99de9b4280daea0a7eda0d86c33) please visit: [www.sheridan.church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10324.1.0ec4b477eb2a09dd71b9d670430421f3)
| | [ Partner with Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17646944.10325.1.6b87af21c9d4d4449cdcc496336bf67c)

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. _[Do you think Biden put Americans in danger?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62296028:JjWuBhGAN:m:1:3331421248:F8E7EC668A62B2081AC6887EDBC93E87:r "Do you think Biden put Americans in

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62296029:JjWuBhGAN:m:1:3331421248:F8E7EC668A62B2081AC6887EDBC93E87:r "Can I count on

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott

But you can't use it if you don't know the details. **Don't put your future in someone else's hands.** The time to prepare for an economic hurricane is before it hits. Seize the opportunity to protect your finances while you still can. body:

**The big question is -**
What position do you sleep in?

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]

With every good wish, Maggie Hassan [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Friend, President Biden has spent the first two years of his administration delivering _huge_ wins for American families:

* He successfully led the passage of **the Inflation Reduction Act,** a massive bill that will help families struggling with the impact of inflation and jump-start our fight against climate change.

* He rebuilt our economy from the wreckage of the Trump administration and **secured the lowest unemployment rate in decades.**

* And just last fall, he **led Democrats to HISTORIC wins** during the 2022 midterm elections.

When President Biden addresses Congress and American families across the country in just a few hours, he'll lay out his agenda for the coming year. **This is a crucial moment for Democrats to rally behind President Biden — and that's why we're counting on your response to our live poll.**

| Peter,

| NEWSFLASH: 🇺🇸 Standing for the American flag is NOT controversial! 🇺🇸
But apparently, no one told Jerry Nadler and the Democrats in the House...
Peter, I put forward a simple amendment to begin our Judiciary Committee meetings with the Pledge of Allegiance.
But THEN - this idea of a daily dose of patriotism was immediately shot down by Nadler and the Democrats. They seriously believed it was a waste of time to stand and pledge allegiance to the flag that generations of veterans have fought to defend!
Get THIS - they even tried to somehow work in the Fed-surrection as their justification for opposing my amendment...
Why does patriotism make Democrats so heated?!
It's still unclear, Peter - but I know one thing for sure...
If that display of patriotism got them triggered, then sending another message of patriotism on behalf of our entire movement is going to REALLY send these radicals over the edge!
[So please help me send that message today and remind these Woketopians that the Pledge is NOT a waste of time. ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010aFkoS1JoVmFq9dIjn8YmPQzKbgbCdudf91A_kV77B2Xhpnhy_xZ8bfXeZTrpRtbM54TY9IPItxO-de8uv5eyOByizBLIsBbIGipPkoI7jT2Zu8wAygisAq6zuS85evL3ntdl2PQXL-rk92vGQ57IEceD1GcGi91_fXM73_IVEhkfR5IGR9-xlAbQxU5VvFdQSgmyBmHU8aCO9WoHR1IviIsj_rY1-YeH7zCj0a63rM=&c=FXUCZ-RmXr59OyHufWsq852wcX5IuS2v4-MKbZQs7BUVQJJZc6CE7g==&ch=RJHL0z4AVOkm5h-dHCayW9bTf9f5KykPhs1drvkCNt1Dt7SsWY65xQ==)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Updates from the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends - a quick note before the week gets hectic.
Thank you SO much for stepping up last week with so many donations to the National Network of Abortion Funds. I’m blown away by this group’s generosity, and I’m humbled by your willingness to give whatever you can, whenever you can.
Aside from celebrating my 34th birthday (with help from all of you!), I spent last week thinking about a few current priorities:
- My new SAFER Health Act , which would prohibit doctors from disclosing health information relating to pregnancy loss or termination without patient consent.
- The severe housing crisis we’re seeing in San Diego and around the country, particularly the scarcity of housing that’s affordable for our veteran community.
- Solutions for child care - too many parents are faced with either taking on extra work to afford it, or leaving the workforce to do it themselves.
As you read this, I’m guessing some of you may be thinking: That’s all important to think about, but what is she going to DO about any of it in a GOP-led House? It’s a fair question, and I’ll be honest with you - it will be tougher to get things done in the minority.
But a lot of the work I did last term was accomplished by reaching across the aisle, and that’s exactly what I’m going to do again this year. There are Republican members who care about data privacy. There are Republican members who care about military housing and the way we treat our servicemembers. There are real opportunities to get things done and make progress - maybe not overnight, and maybe not without some hard work and tough compromises, but I’m committed to finding a path.
I heard someone pose this rhetorical question recently: “If you had a flat tire, would you get out and slash your three remaining tires, or would you replace the flat and get back on the road?”
Sure, we’re facing a pretty brutal flat tire right now in the House - and it’s one that we can’t replace until 2024. But there are also 212 Democratic members who were elected to get things done for our districts and our country, and we’re not going to sit around slashing our other three tires - we’re going to get to work.
Thanks for reading!
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Feb. 7: REVEAL Key Facts About Biden’s Border Crisis
body:
| | |
---
This week, use our Align Act campaigns to demand answers about Biden’s border crisis, oppose dangerously unqualified judicial nominees, and stop the radical left from meddling in your kitchen!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
With all-time records for illegal crossings, drug smuggling, and brutal human trafficking, it’s clear the Biden administration has lost control of security at the southern border. **[Sign your name to this petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** to **URGE CONGRESS** to keep up the pressure on left-wing officials to give us answers on Biden’s handling of the border crisis!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | As if the Biden administration hasn't squandered enough American resources on illegal immigration into the United States, public school administrators are now soliciting teachers to [pay off human smugglers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). In Rhode Island, Assistant Principal Stefani Harvey asked her colleagues at Mount Pleasant High School to pay off a student's $5,000 debt to a cartel, according to leaked emails in which Harvey described the "Coyote" cartel as a "group that helps people." Since October 2022, nearly [300,000 illegal immigrants](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._58kEBDmRpqA) have evaded overwhelmed Border Patrol agents at the southern border and another [564 illegal aliens with criminal convictions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-EJPtUsEXSvqH3C2A) have been released from detention into the United States just since the new year.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-obSiw)
---
President Biden’s latest nominee for a lifetime position in federal court is a doozy... Charnelle Bjelkengren said repeatedly to Congress that the U.S. Constitution, “did not come to mind.” With such a blatant disregard for our founding principles, it’s clear Biden’s latest nominee is unqualified for such an important role in America’s justice system. **[Urge your U.S. Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._AA)** to vote NO on Biden’s nominee!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-IBU98E2z0X6N6Mw)
---
|
---
| | State election offices across the country are slowly waking up to a harsh reality: a network of partisan nonprofits will stop at nothing to systematically influence election results in their favor. Ottawa County, Michigan's clerk Justin Roebuck [recently declined](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQ2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/CVD4OZzPIILUv6S6P91oPA) $1.5 million in partisan funding from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence, a nonprofit linked to Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg's [2020 scheme to increase Democrat turnout.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQ2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/W75tiyU36Lu2gxPFH7phsA) Over the next five years, the Alliance plans to funnel $80 million in "dark money" to reshape election offices one by one through a comprehensive awards program. Roebuck, however, completely withdrew his office from the program after being named a finalist. "While I value the overall stated goals of the Alliance, I firmly believe that funding for election administration must come from federal, state and local governments," Roebuck said. "Election administration is critical government infrastructure and when private individuals seek to fund election operations, it casts a shadow over public trust in the process, particularly when the resources can be tied to individuals or groups who may have also contributed to political parties or candidates."
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.--n5PedVQ)
---
Our efforts to SAVE the gas stove are working! Sen. Ted Cruz has introduced a bill to prevent the Biden administration from meddling in your kitchen. Keep up the heat! [**Please sign our Align Act petition**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) urging Congress to demand answers from the Biden administration and hold a hearing with CPSC Commissioner Richard Trumka, Jr.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
| | The Left is showing early warning signs that it intends to mount an effort to [take away Americans' pickup trucks and SUVs](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). Some of the impetus is coming from a globalist initiative called [Vision Zero.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MzQ2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/092S2QTN-2iVEts7q-OETA) The organization advocates red light cameras and speed cameras, which left-leaning municipalities have embraced because although they haven't magically reduced traffic accidents and fatalities, they have been prodigious revenue raisers for cash-strapped, mismanaged cities. The organization suggests that trucks are disproportionately responsible for injuries and fatalities among children. The Left's ultimate dream would be to take our trucks off the road. But electric vehicle alternatives weigh comparatively more and could be expected to result in more severe injuries to pedestrians. But safety was likely never their goal in the first place.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._P7bUgjuLuqE0FvkG1hgQ)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwMzgtZGFiYTE5ZTU3OTViNGM3YmI3Zjc4ZDYxMDYzOTk3ZGUiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzQ2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/HepupXvvgAIMAzLqA6kAXQ)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Biden’s State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Peter, Joe Biden’s State of the Union address is tonight, but right now I’m grateful for all the accomplishments the President and Democrats in Congress have completed so far.

Through the power of faith and action, we made huge strides in creating a better America, despite our narrow majorities and constant pushback from Republicans.

Here are just a few things Democrats and I have accomplished for the people:
– We made historic green energy investments, addressing the ongoing climate crisis, and investing millions of dollars in job creation for families right here in Ohio and across the country.
– We took steps toward student debt cancellation, canceling more than $10,000 for 43 million former students.
– We passed the first gun violence prevention legislation in over 20 years.
– We put America back to work, with Americans enjoying the lowest unemployment rate since the moon landing in 1969.

The American people know Democrats are on their side. That's why they came out in huge numbers to defeat the GOP’s predicted red wave. When all the pundits counted us out, I kept the faith, and I know that you did too, Peter. Now, our faith has paid off, Democrats are going into 2023 in a great position to deliver for the people.

I’m excited for President Biden’s State of the Union address, but before we get there, I have to know: what do you want to hear from President Biden tonight? Will you take our survey and let us know?

TAKE THE SURVEY: https://secure.ngpvan.com/UZ6l3KAme0GN3qIOsYnotw2?refcode=EM_PET_230206BidenSOTU_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTA_PT

We’re in this together,

Shontel Brown
-------------------
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need?

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sb-em?refcode=EM_PET_230206BidenSOTU_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTA_PT

Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
Shontel Brown for Congress
PO Box 221232
Beachwood, OH 44122
United States

body:
Hurry claim your signed copy before 11:59 PM

|

| | |
Hi there Friend. Have you seen this exciting news?

_**Dr. Ben Carson just released his new book Created Equal and I 've got a signed copy with your name on it!**_ _**[CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE>>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zugshu5n47npldfi0i2d928o8iboqdql5qsqsrj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie8p74cth2bs "CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE")**_

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaq5go95g5vofndol0mqef7k448n57tvauic8f3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie8p74cth2bs "Ben Carson Book")
---
| | | [CLAIM MY SIGNED COPY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zicf4cbrlio8ohdge3pn9rupeit5r8gefiggfqjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie8p74cth2bs "CLAIM MY SIGNED COPY")
---
In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

Thank you,

Elisa

In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

Elisa

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkicv836q0756ed7rf8cgsg6au7f2p0upfcj4bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0nd2b06ctgu0auo34qjgv6ibrbkmqrm0ieu0n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl7bidpkah431q0m50vlchct1edg58hits9mlp48_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0len6gh56sipurmngppg8op40duau7nqmalq1o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zulsd953oagn2gbh64lh82l1kftoal04cmmrq168_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeed1598tm481b39a373hmd2j0flgc640kplrh0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp03mle27jomftng8pjatso92cb2ienih355mqf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmd0hi1m0l8b9o491h9jc032hg502dp0l01u3aoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf7cqh0rinjig8km2om9hrcmuaibpc591ftudrc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86agm9qgaqsch269p3lsg39kuh7dm8j4sicf7ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctiecpr4c3h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdbs4293nc3vnnc71eod35njbge5feto3fnqa8io_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cljm9pj7chge49fg)

name: Team Cammack
subject: Will Biden tell the truth?
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJrCPV5kxELRYC_saGrO9-0KkBUMVR7sdQIRDVNaJHIRRktxopY4dNkBeAnb-Vzn7lJ6hz3ubVsKb4MxFWx1Gp-6nl7IepyGCpkU-SMhYXScvPYTiQNKMEYmppeOnfRyJNdPAC3rwBTWynrPIt-BLiOzwNg0qjxs0wg81mPoat7PAJJ7EWT94Sw3DU2qkPpgtKV3uwXkaOc=&c=k9RPvHaAj6VayXDsh2dEYpoZy4aHafCSWUTBlFk84m5DFQRi65e0Sg==&ch=BgACgprc5Lmo3eWFIhKJZa7E1LeZ8ktlosWLOyzkIub024D8VzBNGw==)
---
| Friend
Biden's State of the Union address is just hours away, and we want to ask you, Friend: do you think he will tell the truth?
Tonight, we expect to hear nothing but the same tired excuses, more lies about his policies, and more calls for federal overreach and spending. However, we want to hear straight from the people who have had to endure high prices, high crime, and overreach. Do you think he will be honest about the current state of our nation?
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJrCPV5kxELRYC_saGrO9-0KkBUMVR7sdQIRDVNaJHIRRktxopY4dNkBeAnb-Vzn7lJ6hz3ubVsKb4MxFWx1Gp-6nl7IepyGCpkU-SMhYXScvPYTiQNKMEYmppeOnfRyJNdPAC3rwBTWynrPIt-BLiOzwNg0qjxs0wg81mPoat7PAJJ7EWT94Sw3DU2qkPpgtKV3uwXkaOc=&c=k9RPvHaAj6VayXDsh2dEYpoZy4aHafCSWUTBlFk84m5DFQRi65e0Sg==&ch=BgACgprc5Lmo3eWFIhKJZa7E1LeZ8ktlosWLOyzkIub024D8VzBNGw==)
---
| Kat has never been shy about being an AMERICA FIRST fighter, and she has always stood against the Biden agenda that has cost the American people their freedoms, trillions of dollars, and PUT THEM LAST.
That is why we are asking you now before he spins the lies that the D.C. establishment told him to say. Do you think Biden will be a responsible leader and tell the American people point-blank about the [state of the southern border, the crippling economy, or weakened national security?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJrCPV5kxELRYC_saGrO9-0KkBUMVR7sdQIRDVNaJHIRRktxopY4dNkBeAnb-Vzn7lJ6hz3ubVsKb4MxFWx1Gp-6nl7IepyGCpkU-SMhYXScvPYTiQNKMEYmppeOnfRyJNdPAC3rwBTWynrPIt-BLiOzwNg0qjxs0wg81mPoat7PAJJ7EWT94Sw3DU2qkPpgtKV3uwXkaOc=&c=k9RPvHaAj6VayXDsh2dEYpoZy4aHafCSWUTBlFk84m5DFQRi65e0Sg==&ch=BgACgprc5Lmo3eWFIhKJZa7E1LeZ8ktlosWLOyzkIub024D8VzBNGw==)
---
| | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJrCPV5kxELRYC_saGrO9-0KkBUMVR7sdQIRDVNaJHIRRktxopY4dNkBeAnb-Vzn7lJ6hz3ubVsKb4MxFWx1Gp-6nl7IepyGCpkU-SMhYXScvPYTiQNKMEYmppeOnfRyJNdPAC3rwBTWynrPIt-BLiOzwNg0qjxs0wg81mPoat7PAJJ7EWT94Sw3DU2qkPpgtKV3uwXkaOc=&c=k9RPvHaAj6VayXDsh2dEYpoZy4aHafCSWUTBlFk84m5DFQRi65e0Sg==&ch=BgACgprc5Lmo3eWFIhKJZa7E1LeZ8ktlosWLOyzkIub024D8VzBNGw==)
---
| For Florida and America, Team Cammack
[P.S. Consider donating if you want to further support Kat's fight for America!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TJrCPV5kxELRYC_saGrO9-0KkBUMVR7sdQIRDVNaJHIRRktxopY4dNkBeAnb-Vzn7lJ6hz3ubVsKb4MxFWx1Gp-6nl7IepyGCpkU-SMhYXScvPYTiQNKMEYmppeOnfRyJNdPAC3rwBTWynrPIt-BLiOzwNg0qjxs0wg81mPoat7PAJJ7EWT94Sw3DU2qkPpgtKV3uwXkaOc=&c=k9RPvHaAj6VayXDsh2dEYpoZy4aHafCSWUTBlFk84m5DFQRi65e0Sg==&ch=BgACgprc5Lmo3eWFIhKJZa7E1LeZ8ktlosWLOyzkIub024D8VzBNGw==)

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18880?t=1001&akid=2958%2E346206%2EZAvJ8f ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230207-2958-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2958_346206_ZAvJ8f&akid=2958%2E346206%2EZAvJ8f

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2958%2E346206%2EZAvJ8f

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: ** National Heritage Area Act Signed Into Law **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6c100706963c868a/519fa21e78786dbbc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Last year, Senator Shelby and I authored two bills aimed at supporting the preservation and promotion of our great state’s rich history.
One was focused on reauthorization of the Muscle Shoals National Heritage Area. The other aimed to create a second National Heritage Area in our state – the Alabama Black Belt National Heritage Area, which includes 19 counties, to honor the region’s significant impact in the civil rights movement and honor some of our state’s most celebrated cultural figures.
Earlier this month, _both bills were signed into law_ as part of the National Heritage Area Act!
This is great news, and I’d love your help to get out the word.
[**Take a moment to read more here from Yellowhammer News >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6c100706963c868a/c7050af29a46d579c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
And then please take a moment to forward on this email to your family and friends.
I’m proud that we got these bills across the finish line – this is a great example of how our federal government can work with local communities to preserve access to our most important historical and cultural sites here in Alabama.
\- Coach Tuberville
---

name: Team Casey
subject: Why fair pay still matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Will you join Bob in telling congressional Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58387053/390917746/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDg2NDE4NS1mMmE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cN_lBgrSm7DhTYEXEXD7AhYSLxxnftKrA1tb5_q3f-o=&emci=216afd14-68a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ed864185-f2a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Fourteen years ago, the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act of 2009 was signed into law. This landmark bill was intended to help close the pay gap by giving workers more time to hold their employers accountable for pay discrimination.

But today, **American women still only earn about 84 cents for every dollar made by a man working the same job** , according to the National Women's Law Center. In Pennsylvania, the average is even worse: just 81 cents on the dollar. And most workers don't even have access to the data they need to determine whether they may be being discriminated against.

Senator Casey co-sponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the Senate to hold employers accountable and make it harder for them to hide wage discrimination. The House previously passed a version of the bill, but Senate Republicans voted to block it. Now, it's time to push again.

[**Will you join Bob in telling congressional Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act and make pay equity a reality? clean_body: Will you join Bob in telling congressional Republicans to stop obstructing the Paycheck Fairness Act? Peter, Fourteen years ago, the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act of 2009 was signed into law. This landmark bill was intended to help close the pay gap by giving workers more time to hold their employers accountable for pay discrimination. But today, American women still only earn about 84 cents for every dollar made by a man working the same job , according to the National Women's Law Center. In Pennsylvania, the average is even worse: just 81 cents on the dollar. And most workers don't even have access to the data they need to determine whether they may be being discriminated against. Senator Casey co-sponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the Senate to hold employers accountable and make it harder for them to hide wage discrimination. The House previously passed a version of the bill, but Senate Republicans voted to block it. Now, it's time to push again. | | Pay discrimination of any kind is completely unacceptable. It’s not only unfair and unjust to those who face discrimination -- it deprives families of vital income that can be used to feed children, buy or rent a home, and make our communities stronger. None of us can afford to let wage discrimination continue. Help Bob ensure that the Paycheck Fairness Act can finally become law. Thank you, Team Casey Help Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cf2nqfu76nda0j06gjcna04a99tvap6cduhk10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctieepj6c3h2bs)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1bljinorevh5blg2q6v114meo2rimmevd3op100_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctieepj6c3h2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcelb3c0vntrlejjgtc5ictmhq8ldm4fdjtc39s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctieepj6c3h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z50f5n8naplnar168rn9k84gjsaik78fqdn869d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctieepj6c3h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

name: Joe Biden
subject: When I step up to the podium tonight, I will be thinking of folks like you, Derek​.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you. | |
---
My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you, Derek. **You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation.** That is in no small part because of the strength of this grassroots team, Derek. Over the last two years -- and with your help -- Kamala and I have gotten our country back on track. Tonight, I’ll have a chance to speak directly to the American people about all of the progress we’ve made and what we still have left to do. **Before I step up to the podium tonight, will you chip in $7 to the DNC to say you’re still with me in the fight to deliver a better America?**
