clean_body: My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you. | | My team and I are putting the finishing touches on my State of the Union address right now, but before I take the podium, I wanted to reach out to you, Derek. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. That is in no small part because of the strength of this grassroots team, Derek. Over the last two years -- and with your help -- Kamala and I have gotten our country back on track. Tonight, I’ll have a chance to speak directly to the American people about all of the progress we’ve made and what we still have left to do. Before I step up to the podium tonight, will you chip in $7 to the DNC to say you’re still with me in the fight to deliver a better America? From historic action to combat gun violence and climate change, to rebuilding our economy, beating Big Pharma, and ensuring the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations begin to pay their fair share in taxes -- I’m not shying away from the tough fights. After all, it’s why Kamala and I were elected: To fight for folks like you, Derek. And I am so grateful that you are just as committed to working for a better future as we are. I hope you’ll be tuning in tonight, and I hope I make you proud. Thank you for all that you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . | Friend, New Hampshire is once again proving that low taxes and less government means a stronger economy! **January tax revenue numbers are in and they are 26% higher than expected** \- meaning that the tax cuts are doing exactly what they are intended to do, grow our economy and help NH businesses increase earnings.
Despite the doom and gloom from NH Democrats, the Republican state tax cuts from the past few years continue to pay dividends for the Granite State! ### State House Dome: State revenues still boom
By Kevin Landrigan Feb. 4, 2023 You’ve read it many times before: State revenues enjoyed another bumper month. The state took in $203 million for January, generally not a big revenue month. The take was $42 million — or 26% over the forecast for this month and 4.8% over January 2022. Through seven months of the fiscal year, the state has brought in about $250 million — 21.2% more than expected. Compared to the same seven months last year, the state is up $49 million or 3.6%. Once again, business and hospitality taxes are responsible for a bigger revenue surplus. Analysts have been waiting for business tax growth to slow. For the past three months, refunds from the state’s Business Profits Tax have been up substantially compared to the same months a year ago. With collections humming along, the three big months for business tax receipts (March, April and June) will determine just how large the surplus could get. Meanwhile, the state’s real estate market isn’t as white-hot as it was, because of lower inventory and higher interest rates. Through the first seven months, the tax on property transfers has brought in $3 million less than in the same period last year. In January 2023, the tax collected $16 million, compared with $26 million in January 2022 and $25 million in 2021. Because legislative budget writers had expected a steep slowdown of this tax, revenue so far this year is still $29 million more than planned. The only way to truly know the state of the union is by going directly to the voices that matter most - yours.

Will you please take 30 seconds to send me your TOP concerns?

I really need your input before I take the stage tonight. It would really mean a lot to me and to the country to know that my speech and concerns are coming directly from YOU.

Please respond here ASAP so I have time to read through it all!

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. **As a fellow conservative American, you simply cannot afford to ignore what’s happening to our country.** [**That’s why I’m offering you a FREE copy of my explosive new book that exposes the far-left’s evil plot - _FINAL BATTLE: the Next Election Could be the Last._**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05733%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FeuCLDmdMtETetccgNRllg&sysid=1)
---
| | This is a can’t-miss deal that I pray you take advantage of today. My name is David Horowitz. I wrote **_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ **because I’m committed to ending the reign of far-left Marxist elites. _Why?_ Well, 50 years ago... I _was_ a Marxist.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05734%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4uOT1Hs4ucSe5BUN0J83MQ&sysid=1)
---
| | I was side by side with Huey Newton the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. **Then the Panthers murdered my friend. The Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible.** So, I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, _we would lose our country forever._ **And now, I published this book because Americans must wake up and realize just how close our nation is to succumbing to the far-left’s Socialist plot.** [**Claim your copy of _FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ HERE.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05745%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uKsginG2A23%2bMEnZw4uLYw&sysid=1) This book exposes the REAL truth that every American must hear. But don’t just take it from me. Take it from these raving critic reviews:

**New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**

**\-- Dennis Prager**
---
**Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | My friend, I hold NOTHING back in this latest release - which is why I want you to have a free copy of it today. I want you to see, in detail, the shocking revelations I found about:
---
| |
* The un-twisted story of January 6th.
* How “systemic racism” is a curated LIE.
* The illegal immigration numbers leftists have been desperately hiding from you.
* And proof that leftists are illegally manipulating our elections.

---
| | I hope you agree with me when I say that you cannot afford to leave this book unread. That’s why I’m pleased to offer you this book today. [**All you need to do to jump on this exclusive, first-come-first-serve offer is to give a generous tax-deductible donation to my Freedom Center of $35 or more.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05746%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iwhzuGwVX7n3FokTWSf%2bIA&sysid=1) That’s it - as my most sincere thanks for supporting my work and my Freedom Center, I will send you a copy of my new book that leftists _already_ want to ban. The David Horowitz Freedom Center is supported entirely by patriotic Americans like you who want to help us expose the truth about the far-left and save our country from utter destruction. [**A $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more tax-deductible donation won’t just secure yourself a copy of my newest book,_FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_ ...**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05747%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a67EUj67khvPKVFGaOzAsw&sysid=1) But it will support the Freedom Center’s live events, online advertising, our own news publication _FrontPage Mag_ , and more hard-hitting books just like this exclusive free offer - opportunities that advance our conservative movement and wake more Americans up to the truth behind the leftist's plots. [**Just please, don’t delay in accepting your copy of _FINAL BATTLE: The Next Election Could be the Last_. Click here to donate $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to receive your own book in the mail shortly.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05748%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NexvuWj8aMmaHJEKgTXESg&sysid=1)

David Horowitz

body:
Peter Willis, did you
see Amanda’s message about the DNC refusing to even allow a vote on our
proposal to ban dark money in primaries?

We set a goal of 1000 new grassroots donations to fight back against this
attack on democracy by supporting targeted progressives, but we still need

democracy without fighting back with everything we have?

This is outrageous, and we need your help to send a message to the DNC

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I'm Not Done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=85edfb74147b4ba8a45d9318261e11f3&_e=413v7YPwQEBzicQxkHMd-uJeVLfeN7YtoTMCJFMaSWcFktlTHpFj6f1Ufx75hfzZk5BXa-H7ee0ulTOGcoANfmDmaevY9CDQZ7qr0NQP_bfVTBchaz_qSFaQdFir_5C8llJ6ZI74t_7hMk6uFEplXyGfYvxeJ25if4FV6nJA1HHUBeS2DiNej1vjfDRU7NsjjOdcWOMAdeQss7cZQSEnhUX9HyujwWdYndmrnkd43X6POdboCamzbFrFnbzLvX_ryVeYrtmq-gSx7dSQ2hFM7qy_UPQanXfEKAW9Cv_6RdDGlM_nSYkzvFHBDQEWaaqcdtPkgGZJB3krU3_7-x4C6ttzjsFKPB9b4wufskYJUDomdOy0cEC0N1zzpMZTp-Kt)
---
Peter, Last year, three months after I retired from the United States Navy, I felt a different call to serve. The nation I spent my adult life defending was quickly turning into the country I ran away from. Our rights, secured under the Constitution, are being stripped away in the name of equity and social justice. I entered the race for Virginia’s Tenth Congressional District with the grassroot support of men and women just like you; Americans who want to believe that our best days are ahead of us.

Even though we didn’t win, we moved the needle so far, and came so close to flipping the Tenth District, that it captured national attention. We also learned valuable lessons and I vowed that I would take those lessons to help improve the landscape of Virginia and the rest of the country. That is why we launched Unleash America PAC. Unleash America PAC is dedicated to supporting leaders and policies that strive to embolden American resilience and ingenuity. My parents risked everything, including their lives, to bring us out of Vietnam and into this incredible nation of opportunity. We came to the United States with nothing, but through hard work and perseverance, we made a life for ourselves. I attended top schools in the nation, Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology and the United States Naval Academy. I earned a master’s degree in physics from the Naval Postgraduate School and pursued fellowships at MIT and Harvard. I paid back this country’s gift of freedom to my family with twenty-five years of service in Special Operations. I believe in protecting the American dream and I am not done fighting.

Through Unleash America PAC, we have an opportunity to support strong, decisive leadership who serve us, not special interests. We will use the lessons learned from the 2022 elections to turn the tide and restore hope in the American dream. I ask you to stand with me and fight for freedom, the Constitution, and our way of life.
---
[**STAND WITH ME TODAY**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=85edfb74147b4ba8a45d9318261e11f3&_e=413v7YPwQEBzicQxkHMd-uJeVLfeN7YtoTMCJFMaSWcFktlTHpFj6f1Ufx75hfzZk5BXa-H7ee0ulTOGcoANfmDmaevY9CDQZ7qr0NQP_bfVTBchaz_qSFaQdFir_5C8llJ6ZI74t_7hMk6uFEplXyGfYvxeJ25if4FV6nJA1HHUBeS2DiNej1vjfDRU7NsjjOdcWOMAdeQss7cZQSEnhUX9HyujwWdYndmrnkd43X6D96m-Ugc_y7Qlse8IldXhtLpukTUAy7-l7rVMY6JUrG3Z4YRbVY9js2yvAFfXOhW6HGX3OdVCF7k3UoQwTXMpS_-HnluxPIIUbplim38QYL85WPDybhmNEqPKhwkVzLOemFsohv8cdR4HJYQQt-9J)
---
In Liberty,
---
---
CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret)

clean_body: | WELCOME TO THE NEWLY-BRANDED HILLBILLY ON THE HILL The one and only newsletter compiling all of Ohio 's favorite Senator's work in Washington and in Ohio. Our newsletters will return to your inboxes every first Tuesday of the month. As always, thank you for joining us! Senator Vance over the weekend: 'IT'S NOT JUST AN HONOR, IT'S A GREAT RESPONSIBILITY' () - Senator Vance sat down for a Q&A to discuss his plans as Senator. A MONTH SINCE TAKING OFFICE, Senator Vance addressed the work he has done to deliver on the promises he made to Ohio. Watch his short video below discussing all that he 's done: ' HE HAS MY SUPPORT IN 2024 BECAUSE I KNOW THAT HE WON'T RECKLESSLY SEND AMERICANS TO FIGHT OVERSEAS' () - "My entire adult lifetime has been shaped by presidents who threw America into unwise wars and failed to win them... "...In Mr. Trump's four years in office, he started no wars despite enormous pressure from his own party and even members of his own administration." "...That fact, more than any single accomplishment, is the enduring legacy of Mr. Trump's first term. But there is much more to do, and I'm supporting him for president in 2024 because he's the only person certain to do it." - Senator Vance on endorsing President Trump for 2024 'PEOPLE ARE UNABLE TO DRIVE THEMSELVES TO WORK' () - "One thing this legislation does, is makes those catalytic converters more traceable, so that our cops can catch the bad guys and prevent this stuff from happening in the future" - Senator Vance Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: 'THE IRRESPONSIBILITY HERE IS NOT PUTTING THE COUNTRY ON A LONG-TERM PATH TO FISCAL SANITY' - Senator Vance joined to discuss the debt ceiling. "The irresponsible thing is to do nothing, which is unfortunately exactly what the Democrats are proposing. I don't think that's actually going to happen, because Republicans are standing firm." - Senator Vance Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' I'D LIKE TO STOP THE FLOW OF ILLEGAL DRUGS' () - Senator Vance joins WKBN to discuss his top priorities as Senator. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' CLEARLY THE FBI HAS DECIDED THAT JOE BIDEN IS GOING TO BE TREATED WITH KID GLOVES' \-- Senator Vance joins to discuss the FBI searches and why more and more Americans are losing trust in our law enforcement. Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' WE NEED TO BE MORE CAREFUL WITH AMERICAN TAX DOLLARS'() - "...Especially when we have the fiscal situation, the budgetary situation that we have here in Washington, we can't spend money willy nilly without knowing where it goes..." "This is not a partisan issue, Democrats and Republicans--if you look at the people that are supporting our actions in Ukraine it is both parties. This is still a country that believes in freedom, this is a country that believes that aggressors should be repelled and this brutal act of aggression that we see play out on our TV screens every single night, our heart just goes out to the people of Ukraine, but we should continue to do absolutely everything we can to assist the brave men and women who are fighting there." - Senator Vance Watch Senator Vance 's full interview: ' JD VANCE HAS SHOWN WHAT A SERIOUS POPULISM LOOKS LIKE' () - "J.D. Vance, once celebrated by the commentariat for his memoir, Hillbilly Elegy, has now drawn their scorn. His crime? Indicting the failures of the American elite on economics and foreign policy. No other Senate candidate stood so firmly against recklessness in Ukraine. No other Republican office-holder has spoken so strongly in defense of Medicare and Social Security. On both issues, J.D. Vance has shown the kind of leadership needed in the Republican Party." I defended this country for years as a Navy SEAL, and just because I’ve traded combat gear for Congress doesn’t mean I’ve stopped doing everything I can to keep Americans safe.

The chaos at our Southern border puts _every American_ in danger.

Drugs, guns, and criminals are pouring into border towns and spreading throughout the country - and it’s all because of the dangerous cartels that currently control the border.

_**Peter, we have the resources to take on the cartels, but the radical Left REFUSES to let us use them.**_

**That ends TODAY.**

**I’m working with former Green Beret Col. Mike Waltz to pass an authorization for the use of military force to allow us to unleash the full resources of the U.S. military on the cartels once and for all, and we need your help.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, I defended this country for years as a Navy SEAL, and just because I’ve traded combat gear for Congress doesn’t mean I’ve stopped doing everything I can to keep Americans safe. The chaos at our Southern border puts every American in danger. Drugs, guns, and criminals are pouring into border towns and spreading throughout the country - and it’s all because of the dangerous cartels that currently control the border. Peter, we have the resources to take on the cartels, but the radical Left REFUSES to let us use them. That ends TODAY. I’m working with former Green Beret Col. Mike Waltz to pass an authorization for the use of military force to allow us to unleash the full resources of the U.S. military on the cartels once and for all, and we need your help. Peter, the Left’s complete apathy towards the crisis at our border is astounding. Instead of supporting our brave border patrol agents and holding criminals accountable, they want to open it up even more to allow God knows what and who in. Let me be clear: it’s not just petty crime at the border. It’s organized paramilitary groups who are dead-set on killing innocents and profiting off of their reign of violence and terror. Militarized criminals need a military response, and that’s why Col. Waltz and I are going on the offensive against the cartels. But we can’t do it without you. | | Thank you, Dan Crenshaw | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6p2ubn1vnn1r90f15a86t2278emfvkjd23d5nog_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znogv532at98b7nbovekfr43u4307t771a1k8u1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z51toerb48lg05n9mrjac070eup48l9d7gjsmik8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpvbk3nqm5p3hkhbugnjhp7cds26frag462b6eco_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z54bgpga7sr0s49ec0aui5b40b4evph5ufboenbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqrrgmesq4tb3kjbknrkqe057p5v3un9kei54l5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4dno1i05f1iu4luc254dg69526d1ajg81bcb4pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5ctie9o32cjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zva0mgpbhe38l4839o285f6kqi6ggiksutjmergo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq8mnl9vsnj99knv3h6q4iupd0dmc111h8irorno_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cljm9p70c9ie49fg)

I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! ---|--- | Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: "When they're sinking, throw 'em an anvil." … Eric Swalwell gives a masterclass in dealing with the GOP.
body:
Rep. Swalwell gives a masterclass in dealing with the GOP.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebb80085-ef15-4bf1-a18e-415bfa9aab44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_" When they're sinking, throw 'em an anvil." It's an old saying that describes what Rep. Eric Swalwell and other Democrats have come to understand._** _You may have seen the outstanding speech Swalwell gave in defense of his colleague Rep. Ilhan Omar the other day. He delivered it as Kevin McCarthy removed her from House committees "anti-Semitism," while putting Marjorie Taylor Greene, believer in Jewish lasers and Soros conspiracy theories, back on her committees._ More hypocrisy, lies and conspiracy from Republicans, what's new, right? **_BUT...something very important is changing, and Rep. Swalwell is one of those leading the way. Democrats are climbing out of their defensive crouch, where we were as they accused us of "killing babies" and tried to overthrow our government. Too worried about decorum, not worried enough about democracy._** **No more.** **Swalwell, just to pick one of this new breed, hits back hard and hits back often. He gets this isn't about *revenge,* but what people hear. If you let bullies walk all over you, the media and public get the mistaken impression these sniveling GOP cowards are tough (which is laughable), and Democrats are not.** [**_Will you join the Blue Amp Community in rewarding/supporting Rep. Swalwell, letting him know we appreciate his fighting for us and calling out lies? Will you give him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to continue fighting hard for all we hold dear?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T031b300f-42bc-4532-b6e2-fde23a889fcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34a3e87a-e6bd-41d0-880d-b3d71f92ba66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc62c934e-d78f-4c42-b251-90d30faeddb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Look, this wouldn't be our first choice, that would be a functioning democracy with a Republican Party that hadn't gone insane the past generation. **But, it's the only way we beat those whose very nature is to not play fair, because they don't believe in democracy. We must support and provide incentives for more of this. Because holding into our democracy is too important for niceties**_**. ** [**_So, will you join the Blue Amp Community in rewarding/supporting Rep. Swalwell, letting him know we appreciate his fighting for us and calling out lies? Will you give him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to continue fighting hard for all we hold dear?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99458c5c-407e-49da-b90c-a9640710b632/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Thank you_ for helping get Democrats into fighting shape to beat back fascism. On this State of the Union day, supporting Swalwell is the way to ensure we strengthen it.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97c16fb9-908a-4fe8-9045-ce6680462df4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/swalwelltakesgoptotask-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda2338de-acdc-4828-8065-a96656e90cc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: the cool part
body:
(not me, but them) |
---
| | Check it out...

Yesterday I presented my bill in committee to further secure parental rights when it comes to a parent's decision to vaccinate or not vaccinate their child.

[Here's a portion of it](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=5b81746293&e=dea908e0fe "watch it"):

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=eae8c1364c&e=dea908e0fe)

But the inspiring part **_isn't what I said._**

It's what **_the other Senators in the committee said_** afterward as they echoed the same desire to further secure parental rights for Idahoans when it comes to vaccinations.

I sent it to you because not many people get to watch these hearings.

And I think we focus on the BAD stuff we don't like so much, that it's cool to see a taste of the good stuff too.

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s. **

If you like what these Senators had to say \- [**let them know**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=036d7b2f95&e=dea908e0fe "Let them know ")!

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=99080a116d).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) Want to support the cause? [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b90c944c50&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight").

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

name: Team TNDP
subject: re: "Lee-ding the Nation"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

Bill Lee addressed Tennessee last night during his State of the State and had the audacity to say that we are leading the nation. We're "Lee-ding" the nation alright, in all the wrong ways.

As Democrats, we feel that it is a disgrace to claim that we are leading in anything when we have some of the worst health and economic outcomes in the country. And as for his new plans? Well, here's a bit of what Lee has in store:

❌ "Infrastructure" (AKA his toll lane plan with no focus on transit)
❌ Kicking 300,000 people off TennCare
❌ Expanding his voucher plan at the expense of public schools
❌ Targeting healthcare for trans people

This is just some of what our hapless Governor has in store. We've got to keep building so that we can elect a Democrat to the Governor's office. Chip in now to help us fight back → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

It's clear that Bill Lee is failing Tennesseans. Even his biggest claim to fame, Tennessee's finances, is a lie — we're one of the most federally-dependent states in the nation, and on top of that, we are sitting on a multi-billion dollar "rainy-day" fund while keeping millions of Tennesseans in poverty.

The only way for things to change is to elect Democrats across the state. Can you donate $10 right now to help us prepare to go hard for our Democratic candidates in 2024 and 2026? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Building true leadership,

Team TNDP

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party.Carol V. Abney, Treasurer.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Contributions or gifts to Tennessee Democratic Party are not tax deductable.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE!
body:
Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
**Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally
Back In Stock, Inventory Limited!** Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... **it's WHEN.** A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: **One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out.** Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf6ps29agj0vqju7u4luh5oc1c04k6ae476tg57o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs) [**YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9pnmmchd8bge144rr11hhan8hgmni246bb4u7dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. [**You also get $243.90 of FREE Gifts today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zps9ll94ms3evtjkjd1r9sm5ueee10mt33la9cvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs)
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgjbk02sgic4sh8hbgoc98kense0opm7t4omm830_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zirbt8b5u85s40jrlg50j643623qg2jcj0f43udg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zki64vrjgd58g8k2fvr8fs2c0e9uge0l8ak6hjg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs) | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4dfki9mvmf2tpvplmui3m7kdd54jd91blvdbduo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g60p30slh2bs)

clean_body: Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited! "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device Could Save Your Life in a Dangerous Blackout Our #1 Most Requested Item Finally Back In Stock, Inventory Limited! Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL, Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the SEAL Survival Guide. The last two years has taught us that it's not IF you need a backup plan... it's WHEN. A deadly pandemic, dangerous blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. It's sad, but facts are facts. Crisis mode has become the new normal. And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. So let me be clear: One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're always fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than that split second when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. All your critical devices are now on borrowed time. All your critical communications, comfort and protection, suddenly called into question. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget. Well now you can... Because for the FIRST TIME EVER you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's safe to use inside because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick Finally... a Mini Solar Generator that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone! Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE. You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes. Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe Fast Recharge Long-Lasting Battery Recharge 2,000 Times! Easy to Use Completely Portable & Easy to Use! Powers Your Favorite Devices FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included and more! That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: "I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!" Craig W. Police Officer | | Rita L. This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. ---|--- | Steve G. Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. ---|--- | Thomas B. Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. ---|--- | Jana H. Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. ---|--- | Allan D. Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! ---|--- | Chris S. Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! ---|--- | Richard B. Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! ---|--- | Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. ---|--- If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friends,
Since my time as a public defense attorney, I have seen too many lives ruined by the failed war on drugs.
It’s long past time we listen to the majority of Minnesotans and Americans who believe we should legalize marijuana and enact restorative justice for nonviolent offenders caught up in our justice system.
[**Will you stand with me and raise your voice today? Add your name: Legalize marijuana and expunge past convictions for marijuana possession now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58393703/390943366/757375843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjA1NDg4Zi1mZGE2LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wmxXYFLVK776pII3WGD5_bvRjZllZW7Utosru5e9jI=&emci=6105488f-fda6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6b05488f-fda6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=11037791)

Legalizing adult-use cannabis will offer broad benefits across our state – from expanding our state’s economy, improving our criminal justice system, creating good-paying jobs across our state, and creating more space for law enforcement to focus on violent crime.
**If any state can do this right, it’s Minnesota. Add your name to raise your voice in support of adult-use cannabis today:**

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Ryan Chamberlin's Freedom Walk to Support the Desantis Agenda
body:
| | |
---

My friends, this upcoming Saturday, February 11th, we plan to walk 3,000 homes in one day. Why? It is quite simple. We can take our message straight to the voters and let them know that a vote for Ryan Chamberlin is a vote for the Ron DeSantis agenda.

We have already walked over 2,000 homes, but on Saturday February 11th we will more than double that in one day.

If you were going to donate some time to help Ryan win, this is the day!

We are asking everyone to meet at the Mojo Grill on SE 17th Street and Hwy 200 (Near Target) at 9:15AM on Saturday Feb 11th

( Let us know you're coming here - [_https://rebrand.ly/WalkwithRyan_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i5lb.EtByQve0iI&b=k9mTYbiFCbcL57.t8CAzPQ) _)_
[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i5lb.EtByQve0iI&b=k9mTYbiFCbcL57.t8CAzPQ)

**EVERYONE that attends will receive a RED – Ryan Chamberlin Campaign shirt** , and we will have a camera crew taking photos and videos of all of us.

[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i5lb.EtByQve0iI&b=k9mTYbiFCbcL57.t8CAzPQ)

So let’s show up!

Please click this link to let us know your shirt size, and we can in turn make sure you have all the information you’ll need to help walk as many homes as possible on the 11th.

Click here now and please invite someone to join you. [_https://rebrand.ly/WalkwithRyan_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=i5lb.EtByQve0iI&b=k9mTYbiFCbcL57.t8CAzPQ)

Ideally, we will only need a total of 2 people per car to cover the most ground.

We will plan to walk around 3 hours, break for lunch, and then go back out for another round (If you can only do 1 round please show anyway :).

We will see you there!

Sincerely,

Ryan

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420

name: Senator Ted Budd
subject: Don’t believe everything you hear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Telling Biden the TRUTH

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Peter,

My parents taught me not to believe everything you hear.

That's a great reminder as we gear up to watch Joe Biden's State of The Union address today.

While some consider it admirable to spin failure into success, Americans know the truth about Joe Biden's record. Inflation is up, crime is up, the southern border is wide open.

It's harder for people to provide for their families and they're seeing their hard-earned wages getting wasted in Washington. It's sad.

Will you help me make one thing very clear to Joe Biden?

**[We do NOT approve of his agenda!](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=08375f2af8314fad8c353496fcbf070d&_e=_0PF6fCp1FdJtpHIAY_cdnywCTLizOGCpVGKrl7RtNkBqa3pKOi9h1sKEbhuJ-q52xilh70aAlHjk7oOgnHs_IRSHDEf3xULn3nLFUbHDaNrnp96GDjjHdKF2ZGbsdXrWwLCDnLi8SiMKuigBYjUXpsME3BzpymO-IqGqOe3IRXertd0acaso1schYnMclBkx_XBI_cGbSiOr3h0uMxA-lGFShIQFRULz1ANGP3IbNBoA8wHPBfyenlb4zHn5frzcKk5Ka64C2no1udNV_0UOjmDo2AlpcpvfukaWZ2em9QL3u4wzRtdFMXC4HVOcqP_LOs3br-qZj0MFUuh0Ws-xOyhNchpsMK5g09McKH0VVr8fGC7a_oNV7QuUXLZjV2Pdr9l8h331-wXHbuD2AS5xamRoNmClUVVGMcc7uBXL1e2Gr2MeEbkUxm1rFUN0P5TOsY0lL8JfhtkFZMDOpOWjswQSmtd2ciTkaKs--sj2zLI2lS9NUEC-YBuN47hiNWgRysgXvvPFyUeiZ0Wt7pgo_FSI_nwpsIequiQCvx5D1zLkDQ9-kiRGuHTXV02wdzA)**

-Senator Ted Budd

name: Larry Hogan
subject: We already know what he'll say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United
body:
Do you agree? | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBEhdz6KTwIIJlVWa5lT4g9YLEnzV10PBxCuRpz2wNE-kyPrIGnY-o4iEKzcUwsXPIWGA6haKTEfXlsJItbVvXQ7MmfeclczoGGzxfjv2mlnKlUNlheFis_hho4xbEiyo6k-w4wlGNf_lMQjabh9-hjK)
---
Hello there, I wanted to personally reach out before tonight's State of the Union address. You're going to hear Joe Biden talk about his administration's successes from the first two years of his presidency, but here is what the American people are talking about:
* **Unaffordable groceries**
* **Divisive rhetoric coming from the White House & Congress**
* **Rising energy costs**
* **Chaos at our southern border**

We want our politicians to put people over politics. We want workhorses, not more show ponies. The movement that _**An America United**_ has ignited is catching steam, and we have only just begun disrupting politics-as-usual. Thousands of Americans are pitching in to help this effort, [**_but we still need more support to keep it fueled._**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBEHf0u91jkC9XB8LvclUZRY0Lql1xBe31eTiNvKmPzsvNsQF8085MhVqXrsSjjTFkQFHDNNFapW6JhXYPlpPIAkvKsZKhoaCp-3fq3mXPSOIFNArrq6__PwtMA78GAt7oOXAfzjf_kPqx3ibzY_bF51) Here's my challenge for you today. I want to show Joe Biden that this movement is serious about finding a better path forward than the one we're currently on. [_**We are looking for 250 supporters to chip in just $5 before his speech. Can we count on you to step up?**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBFAqq6h-g_rUEoylyf0o7NMGkTjXw5NikZr5-bnsTlDH3dZqf6RnSb0sMphZ9goZKPtdVN23hURNybQfVZIxUX8D2uX_CYgRNUtG2oVDbylbqZGfNdsa2UA6uthcMZhBhRQqIA7yqKka8rGEssGbeQH)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBH-f3-XbKl3VMkrTGvC-N_1kp4DABBdqz7SmrazJPhkAcp3psKz_2WA8IK53kvE3CcJwxPCOq5mhfPLlsOCYVLuHwKpUhjsJ7isv9_UnBG_QgKuj-abVkukp-ykM5mEd4mwUTnkI85JaithLdm_9VOP)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBFPiWDTA5Zlaje6jMrDSTTl-36pS-jR5Ju5g5XzO6Wr2g1QMDb8XDE-SIs7-45HJW3k3CrDBQoWU9nLZROlY1J6S-bF5DGvGlKBowfFBkURxGYS0H7qOMVcgOBWrwJKHL6cwpeCckRjSZ27-c6XxDOn)
---
I believe it's time we had open and honest leadership in our country. The growing division is unsustainable and we need leaders who will take off their political party's hat and put on their "people first" hat. If you agree, please join us and commit to sending just [_**$5 before 9PM EST tonight!**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=385183c7bc6c45629283ef60fbfc95d6&_e=h0NYkjJxPs3hfUtkoAgpmSflaAaHWhujLvJF9QD321o2kj1IAUq6rqVNj6qshp-KFX-oCJ6Vu5emQ84T-p8kZ5thENG25VCg1__d5p2DIBE0s-e60FhJe77KCquhTHTZE7dQPLPRA47VsT9kM3rRT2vA_vRlXH-ouzSFJwK6q_cIDMGbXg9E3KAMuQRiOfvUz3D0-IZtOlEnBXr08UxOERYTMsXyHCWMFz21nZ0P346-khyav7YdG9fYCV83hQkh)
---
| | Sincerely,
**Larry Hogan** _Former Governor of Maryland_

name: Court Watch | The NDRC
subject: experts say this Supreme Court case could “haunt American democracy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team – the Supreme Court is considering cases that could gut key provisions of the Voting Rights Act and make it easier for politicians to gerrymander. All of this comes after it issued a decision that eliminated abortion rights in some states.

A.G. Holder had this to say: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58394704/390947601/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230207_FR_2D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYjVkYjdkLTAwYTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ2cS9ej9qmeRG-m5M55XD2gyelH4fFgnHvvA9_m0_c=)
---
Now, the situation at the Supreme Court could go from bad to worse.
**The Fulcrum:
“Moore v. Harper could haunt American democracy.”

MSNBC:
“It is not an overstatement to say that this case could completely upend elections and erase the power of our votes for president.”**
---
[Help Defend Democracy: Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58394705/390947603/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230207_FR_2D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYjVkYjdkLTAwYTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ2cS9ej9qmeRG-m5M55XD2gyelH4fFgnHvvA9_m0_c=)
---
Republicans are advancing a dangerous right-wing legal theory that, if taken to the extreme, would give GOP legislatures unchecked power to gerrymander, implement extreme voter suppression tactics, and even _refuse to certify legitimate presidential election results._

**The outcome of this case could have grave consequences for our democracy...and that leaves us with two options:**
**OPTION ONE: We can do nothing.**

We can sit back, ignore the warning signs, and simply hope that Republicans’ dangerous theories are shut down.

**OPTION TWO: We can keep fighting.**

We can resolve to continue our work of mobilizing communities and electing leaders who will defend our democracy against these ongoing attacks.

[**_We can’t control how the Supreme Court will rule, team, but we can resolve to continue fighting for our democracy – no matter what happens. That’s why the NDRC is taking Option Two.

Will you join us?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58394706/390947605/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230207_FR_2D_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllYjVkYjdkLTAwYTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJ2cS9ej9qmeRG-m5M55XD2gyelH4fFgnHvvA9_m0_c=)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington.
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqpearf0rkld0sthdk1f3bcd8kmqrlp8185lthr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g6cor2cth2bs)

name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: State of Disunion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Tonight, Joe Biden will deliver his state of the union address to citizens across our country who are feeling the pain of his administration’s poor decision-making, incompetence, and downright economic stupidity.

The cameras may not be rolling yet, but I can tell you how this is going to go, Peter.

Joe is going to say that America is thriving. He's going to tell you you're doing well. He's even going to try and pepper in a bit of his woke social agenda.

Friend, **Some members of the media are proclaiming that the America First movement is DEAD. They want nothing more than for our movement to fail.** That hasn’t stopped us at the America First Policy Institute from working around the clock to prove them wrong. **In fact, it’s made us work even harder.** In 2022, we launched the first-ever _America First Agenda: Guide to the Issues_ policy book, the ultimate blueprint for American prosperity, security, freedom, and opportunity. Our team published more than 100 op-eds and policy papers, and we even brought the America First message right to YOU on our bus tour across America. And 2023 is going to be even bigger, friend. **We need to know:[ will you be part of the movement?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658148%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ehy%2fZvfThUlhgCiTQWJW%2fg&sysid=1)**

name: petition signatures needed via Left Action
subject: Sign the petition: DO NOT rename “John Lewis Way” after Donald Trump!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the Petition to Tennessee Lawmakers: DO NOT rename “John Lewis Way” after Donald Trump! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91c763ba-8752-490d-b746-f200ffea14b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | GOP lawmakers in Tennessee have introduced a bill to rename part of a street in Nashville – which is currently named after civil rights icon John Lewis – after Donald Trump. And if that wasn’t enough of an insult, the bill was filed on the first day of Black History Month. This is completely ridiculous. The late, great Rep. John Lewis was rightfully honored with the renaming of this street in Nashville in 2020 for his long legacy as a civil rights activist. Donald Trump doesn’t deserve any street named after him – let alone this one. We’re letting these GOP lawmakers in Tennessee know exactly how we feel about their bill. [Sign your name to tell them: DO NOT rename “John Lewis Way” after Donald Trump! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6f4c735-74e6-49df-b636-4656747233ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: America First is dead?
body:
Sign the 2023 America First Pledge [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1519%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=FE0ZMo3%2frNlyLoRFCP%2fSvQ&sysid=1)

---
Friend, **Some members of the media are proclaiming that the America First movement is DEAD. They want nothing more than for our movement to fail.** That hasn’t stopped us at the America First Policy Institute from working around the clock to prove them wrong. **In fact, it’s made us work even harder.** In 2022, we launched the first-ever _America First Agenda: Guide to the Issues_ policy book, the ultimate blueprint for American prosperity, security, freedom, and opportunity. Our team published more than 100 op-eds and policy papers, and we even brought the America First message right to YOU on our bus tour across America. And 2023 is going to be even bigger, friend. **We need to know:[ will you be part of the movement?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658143%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jJp5I12qj9FqOLIT%2fgNRUw&sysid=1)**

There is great strength in numbers!_ _ Sincerely, America First Policy Institute P.S. **[All donations are tax-deductible. name: Brian Mast (R-FL)
subject: We just banned Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Now, as a member of the Foreign Affairs Committee, I am fighting to hold the Biden Administration accountable for their disgrace
|
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2kndmag286gbgdom150otrci4mdt7mtoagnjj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g62pb6cdh2bs)
---
| Friend,
---
| Following my service in the U.S. Army - where I lost two legs defending our freedom - I volunteered to serve alongside the Israeli Defense Forces because our countries share the values of freedom and democracy.
---
| [HELP ME CONTINUE TO SERVE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5bnitcen519l6tqh2tki8flcaqp9sk9bs4k6d0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g62pb6cdh2bs "HELP ME CONTINUE TO SERVE")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z32gge88mn06qjqu9oto1l1rq9lna5svh65bc7d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g62pb6cdh2bs)
---
| Now, as a member of the Foreign Affairs Committee, I am fighting to hold the Biden Administration accountable for their disgraceful treatment of Israel and embrace of Hamas terrorists. There is no worse offender in Congress on this subject than Ilhan Omar. She is a rabid antisemite whose position on the Foreign Affairs Committee was a massive liability for our country’s national security. That’s why we just voted to boot her off this committee. No longer will she be allowed to spew antisemitic rhetoric from the platform of the Foreign Affairs Committee. No longer will she be allowed to jeopardize our country’s safety. If you agree that Ilhan Omar has no business being on the Foreign Affairs Committee, we need to ensure that Republicans hold the House of Representatives. The moment Democrats regain control they will put her back on this committee. Please, help me ensure that doesn’t happen:
---

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington.
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqnkl98c7v4iapn1v6cbdqnpluhkj8fo52eu720g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g6aob2c1h2bs)

body:
We seek out and endorse only the most proven and tested conservatives, and that’s why we’re

| | Dear friend, Here at Club for Growth Action, we take pride in being the “conservative heavyweight.” We seek out and endorse only **the most proven and tested conservatives** , and that’s why we’re proud to start with **Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat.**
Jim has a long history of fighting for conservative values, and his commitment to free markets and economic growth makes him an ideal candidate. We're excited to support him and proud to be fighting alongside him.
---
| | [**DONATE TO JIM BANKS FOR U.S. SENATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu4fgm73477o6jphgfmh9l8b1i46505eemvushqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g6ap36c5h2bs)
---
| | For conservatives, the real election isn’t always in November. It’s typically won in primary fights earlier in the year. That is how we bring real change to Washington - **electing the most fiscally conservative Republican in the primary!** And this next year, we’ve got a handful of potential primary fights in **MUST-WIN** battleground states like **Arizona, Montana, Ohio,** and **West Virginia**.These are red states that deserve solid conservative senators representing them, not Big-Government Republicans who wish to continue “business as usual” in Washington.Your support will help elect candidates committed to conservative values like **reducing the size of government, cutting wasteful spending,** and **restoring fiscal responsibility**. **[_Please consider making a critical early donation to help support Club for Growth Action-endorsed conservatives in the primaries._](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztsvga889uarav497gdcpj1ikatcu0fnipe7cg08_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g6ap36c5h2bs)**

clean_body: We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023. | | | | | We can’t believe it: 8,284 Democrats have already renewed their 2023 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. Does this look right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 Last year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states. name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington.
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb1hp6n5iaonsbqgbjcoj4rudqsj2e01korlv3s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g66pj2chh2bs)

---
| | Thank you, Rick Scott

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
we have plenty of issues to discuss, but we must also reflect
#
Peter,
Tonight, President Biden will address not only myself and my colleagues in Congress but also the American people.
Although we have plenty of issues to discuss from gun violence and police reform to our economy and the war in Ukraine — we must also reflect on how much progress we have made in just the past two years.
* The unemployment rate fell to 3.4% this year. **That is the lowest jobless level since May 1969.**

* My Democratic colleagues and I delivered on promises to lower prescription drug prices, create new jobs, and confront climate change.

* And we passed legislation like the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ and the _CHIPS and Science Act_ , to strengthen our economy and build a stronger future.

**All of this, while the Senate Judiciary Committee made historic successes over the last two years** , in an evenly divided Senate and Committee.
Under my leadership, the Senate confirmed 97 of President Biden’s highly qualified judicial nominees, including the first Black woman to the Supreme Court — while also advancing crucial legislation and restoring regular agency oversight.
**[This is just the beginning of the work we can do — chip in $5 or whatever you can now to join us in continuing this progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58397549/390958509/1360063505?refcode=dd_em_230207_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODJlNWQ5Ni0wOGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJ1MW7U96MjcP56jzJCRXj0LSpiFxfPJfIvBeYZn9Xo=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Our plans for fair maps have not changed -- team. We started our year by organizing volunteers and providing training for public input at legislative sessions. We are working to ensure map manipulators are held accountable inside and outside the courts, which is why I need your help as we gear up for the many redistricting battles ahead.
I’m counting on folks like you to step up and help us reach our goal. Here is a special link to make sure you’re on our February 2023 Donors List: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Feb2023-AOTL?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58418111/391005047/-1229800645?refcode=20230207_AOTL_F_JordanAOTL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNmJlZGM4LTMyYTctZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-g8Z9eNjMy1BEyvJBln4KMClsoGYgowxDtuRG6MCh4k=)**.
I appreciate your support, team.
\-- Jordan

And I’ve been checking our fundraising numbers, and we are a bit behind our goal (we missed January’s) – which could have a major impact on our ability to fight for our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our plans for fair maps have not changed -- team. We started our year by organizing volunteers and providing training for public input at legislative sessions. We are working to ensure map manipulators are held accountable inside and outside the courts, which is why I need your help as we gear up for the many redistricting battles ahead. I’m counting on folks like you to step up and help us reach our goal. Here is a special link to make sure you’re on our February 2023 Donors List: =.
