name: Team Maggie
subject: debt in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
the long and short of it is that in order to win New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat, our campaign went into debt.
| | |
---
Hi – the long and short of it is that in order to win New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat, our campaign went into debt.

We have no doubt that it was the right thing to do (polls were so tight!). But now, our fundraising has come to a screeching halt compared to what we raised around Election Day, and we’ve still got some pretty big bills left to pay.

We know we ask a lot of you, but this is a really important one:

**[Will you please kick in $3 or more to help retire the debt?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58397880/390960225/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2194-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmY3YzZlMC0wOGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=78ak-BcO1ZUmnGohWLILc9gw-eUhhx2Xh_-lrrnVwZ4=)** With the GOP now in control of the House and pundits already saying 2024 will be tough for Dems, we need to put this to bed ASAP. You’re a top supporter, so we felt like we could ask you.

Here’s the link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58397881/390960226/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2194-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmY3YzZlMC0wOGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=78ak-BcO1ZUmnGohWLILc9gw-eUhhx2Xh_-lrrnVwZ4=)**

Thank you _very_ much.

Team Maggie

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1511%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iZ%2bCm4R%2b4ryqD8ZPgy2vTQ&sysid=1)
| | | Friend,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? [**Can I count on your support?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fYV19xOwcHPIk0ISBMjASw&sysid=1)
---
[**SUPPORT SENATOR SCOTT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zWoxWKlwJndRGlF3CvghwQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Thank you, Rick Scott

Friends - After Kevin McCarthy and the House GOP voted to kick Ilhan off the Foreign Affairs Committee last week, we weren't quite sure what to expect. We knew that our movement had stood together at tough times like these before, but the support we've seen from our district and across the country has been nothing short of incredible. The phones in our office have been ringing off the hook. Thousands upon thousands of messages of encouragement flooded in via social media. And just as the news broke, Bill in Minneapolis made a $25 donation to our campaign. Just a few seconds later, Margarita in Tempe, Arizona added their $10, too. Then it was Patricia in Mt. Prospect, Illinois, with $2.50 more...and we were off to the races. As we said, it's been incredible. But we know that we cannot slow down. The attacks from the right wing and the corporate PACs who fund them are just beginning — and we need to be ready for what's ahead of us on this campaign. name: Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: re: the right to choose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek,

Last month, we should’ve celebrated the 50th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. We should’ve marked 50 years of the right to choose being the law of the land.

Instead, because of the extreme Supreme Court, abortion rights are no longer protected on the federal level and millions of people have lost access to critical reproductive health care.

**Let us be clear: as long as Josh Shapiro is Governor of Pennsylvania, abortion will stay safe, legal and accessible here.**

The freedom to choose is fundamental and we will do whatever it takes to defend it. body:
The fact is this: Our ability to make progress on key issues depends on making our voices heard at the ballot box. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58418690/391007436/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmZjZTU2Zi0zNmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb4WR_rSNw6c42weU3cfKJb_8OscS6I1tMTaIwIxEWU=&emci=fea4a38c-25a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=0bfce56f-36a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58418692/391007438/308015883?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmZjZTU2Zi0zNmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb4WR_rSNw6c42weU3cfKJb_8OscS6I1tMTaIwIxEWU=) Are you tuning into the State of the Union address tonight? President Biden will address a whole slate of urgent issues that Americans are facing — including the state of the economy, gun control, infrastructure, criminal justice reform, and so much more. But the fact is this: Our ability to make progress on _any_ of these issues depends on making our voices heard at the ballot box. **So, we’re taking this opportunity to lay out Fair Fight Action’s State of Voting Rights:** Here in Georgia, Governor Kemp’s law SB 202 made it harder to request an absentee ballot, severely limited access to drop boxes, restricted which provisional ballots will count, and imposed additional burdens on county election officials. And after Congress failed to pass monumental voting rights bills last year, anti-voter state lawmakers were emboldened to introduce even more severe and restrictive voter suppression bills ahead of the 2022 elections. Despite rampant voter suppression efforts, **we defied the odds last election cycle — reaching high turnout levels and expanding access to the polls.** Now, just 37 days into this year, state lawmakers are eyeing the 2024 elections and have strategically introduced _dozens_ of voter suppression bills in states across the country. We can expect that these attacks on our fundamental freedom to vote will ramp up in the coming year. While these attacks are inevitable, **lawmakers are fighting back by introducing over 150 pro-voter bills just this year.** At Fair Fight Action, protecting free and fair elections is the heart of our organization. That means our team is hard at work all year long, educating voters on their rights and challenging barriers to the ballot box. When it comes to protecting our democracy, there’s no “off season.” We’re tracking and monitoring proposed legislation, educating the press about the nuanced dangers of voter suppression, and using every resource at our disposal to fight for voting rights. Despite setbacks from anti-voter lawmakers at the state and national levels, **we’re more committed than ever to continuing to protect our sacred right to vote as we gear up for future elections. ** Our work is just as urgent now as it is in the heat of election seasons; we’re focused on laying the groundwork now for 2024, when Georgia will again be a key battleground state. During the current legislative session in Georgia and with every voter suppression attempt that we unfortunately expect to follow, we’re setting the stage for Georgia voters to freely and fairly exercise their right to vote next year. **We couldn’t keep our efforts going strong without each and every activist (like you!) who’s fighting alongside us.** Thank you, thank you, thank you. The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58418700/391007439/308015883?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230207_e_sotu2_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmZjZTU2Zi0zNmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sb4WR_rSNw6c42weU3cfKJb_8OscS6I1tMTaIwIxEWU=)

clean_body: The fact is this: Our ability to make progress on key issues depends on making our voices heard at the ballot box. | | | = Are you tuning into the State of the Union address tonight? President Biden will address a whole slate of urgent issues that Americans are facing — including the state of the economy, gun control, infrastructure, criminal justice reform, and so much more. But the fact is this: Our ability to make progress on any of these issues depends on making our voices heard at the ballot box. So, we’re taking this opportunity to lay out Fair Fight Action’s State of Voting Rights: Here in Georgia, Governor Kemp’s law SB 202 made it harder to request an absentee ballot, severely limited access to drop boxes, restricted which provisional ballots will count, and imposed additional burdens on county election officials. And after Congress failed to pass monumental voting rights bills last year, anti-voter state lawmakers were emboldened to introduce even more severe and restrictive voter suppression bills ahead of the 2022 elections. Despite rampant voter suppression efforts, we defied the odds last election cycle — reaching high turnout levels and expanding access to the polls. Now, just 37 days into this year, state lawmakers are eyeing the 2024 elections and have strategically introduced dozens of voter suppression bills in states across the country. We can expect that these attacks on our fundamental freedom to vote will ramp up in the coming year. While these attacks are inevitable, lawmakers are fighting back by introducing over 150 pro-voter bills just this year. At Fair Fight Action, protecting free and fair elections is the heart of our organization. That means our team is hard at work all year long, educating voters on their rights and challenging barriers to the ballot box. When it comes to protecting our democracy, there’s no “off season.” We’re tracking and monitoring proposed legislation, educating the press about the nuanced dangers of voter suppression, and using every resource at our disposal to fight for voting rights. Despite setbacks from anti-voter lawmakers at the state and national levels, we’re more committed than ever to continuing to protect our sacred right to vote as we gear up for future elections. Our work is just as urgent now as it is in the heat of election seasons; we’re focused on laying the groundwork now for 2024, when Georgia will again be a key battleground state. During the current legislative session in Georgia and with every voter suppression attempt that we unfortunately expect to follow, we’re setting the stage for Georgia voters to freely and fairly exercise their right to vote next year. We couldn’t keep our efforts going strong without each and every activist (like you!) who’s fighting alongside us. Thank you, thank you, thank you. The Fair Fight Action Team | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. He‘s passed bipartisan legislation (infrastructure, guns), united Democrats on incredibly important measures (COVID stimulus, getting us back to work, and inflation reduction), and has handled the job with grace, class and dignity.

| | | | |

| | | | | Peter, **Tonight will be incredible! Joe Biden gives his State of the Union (SOTU) Address. ** _Even though the media won't tell you, we have a helluva good state of the union. Joe Biden just created 517,000 jobs, yes you read that number right, in January alone! He absolutely destroyed expectations. Unemployment is the lowest since 1969, over half a century ago._ [**_Can you join us in getting Biden's back, giving his reelection campaign $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, as we approach his historic address to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5935d6c-ce7b-4785-817d-db6ab551df6a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Biden came into office on the heels of an attempted coup, has thwarted most GOP attempts at radical insanity, passed bipartisan legislation (infrastructure, guns), united Democrats on incredibly important measures (COVID stimulus, getting us back to work, and inflation reduction), and has handled the job with grace, class and dignity. **_ _Meanwhile, dimwits like Marjorie Taylor Greene and the guy who lost the last presidential election scream and yell about impeaching him and attack his son, a victim of addiction, constantly, cruelly and publicly, even as they know President Biden lost his first wife, daughter and son Beau, all to tragedy._ _They act like have no souls._

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cujBcWzqL1b5itGCL3qdoA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cujBcWzqL1b5itGCL3qdoA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05886%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K2lYLIt7QgkqOzCY0aF%2fzQ&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05887%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GewJHjoJdsbTt4hAOnl%2f1g&sysid=1)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RkOGDxM7vJrL3iek4d6GPw&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05887%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GewJHjoJdsbTt4hAOnl%2f1g&sysid=1)
---

subject: Our movement depends on the Latino community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58399744/390967279/665653053?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230207lvf_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0NTczZC0wZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM6blVqKbN9xYT1F5NxQJgu-NfZRwafo1GKXbx7Lvbc=)
---
Hi team, I want to tell you about Latino Victory — an organization dedicated to building political power in the Latino community. They work to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government, and in the policies that drive our country forward. **Latino Victory was a key supporter of our campaign, and their work is more important than ever.** **[Will you join Latino Victory and support their work by making a contribution today? Their grassroots-powered movement depends on buy-in from folks all across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58399745/390967280/992437179?refcode=GabeVasquez&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0NTczZC0wZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM6blVqKbN9xYT1F5NxQJgu-NfZRwafo1GKXbx7Lvbc=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58399746/390967281/992437179?refcode=GabeVasquez&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0NTczZC0wZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM6blVqKbN9xYT1F5NxQJgu-NfZRwafo1GKXbx7Lvbc=)
---
In the past midterm elections, Latino Victory worked hard to empower Latino voters, increase Latino turnout, and develop the bench of Latino candidates — all with the goal of making Latino voters a deciding factor in political elections up and down the ballot.
As part of their work, they supported more than 80 candidates across 17 key states — **including me.**
I’m here to tell you that the work they do to increase Latino political involvement and representation is important to me as I just hired one of the most diverse congressional offices in Washington. It would not be possible without an engaged and passionate movement, so I’m asking if you can join the team as they work harder than ever to continue that work in 2023 and beyond.
**[Having a strong movement begins with you. Support Latino Victory’s work: pitch in to boost the power of the Latino community today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58399747/390967282/992437179?refcode=GabeVasquez&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0NTczZC0wZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM6blVqKbN9xYT1F5NxQJgu-NfZRwafo1GKXbx7Lvbc=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58399748/390967283/992437179?refcode=GabeVasquez&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E0NTczZC0wZWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LM6blVqKbN9xYT1F5NxQJgu-NfZRwafo1GKXbx7Lvbc=)
---
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you pitching in, signing on, and working hard in key states, we are growing Latino political power. I hope you’ll join Latino Victory’s groundbreaking movement!
Thank you,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.
---

clean_body: We have to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government | = Hi team, I want to tell you about Latino Victory — an organization dedicated to building political power in the Latino community. They work to make sure that the voices and values of Latinos are reflected at every level of government, and in the policies that drive our country forward. Latino Victory was a key supporter of our campaign, and their work is more important than ever. = | = In the past midterm elections, Latino Victory worked hard to empower Latino voters, increase Latino turnout, and develop the bench of Latino candidates — all with the goal of making Latino voters a deciding factor in political elections up and down the ballot. As part of their work, they supported more than 80 candidates across 17 key states — including me. I’m here to tell you that the work they do to increase Latino political involvement and representation is important to me as I just hired one of the most diverse congressional offices in Washington. It would not be possible without an engaged and passionate movement, so I’m asking if you can join the team as they work harder than ever to continue that work in 2023 and beyond. = = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you pitching in, signing on, and working hard in key states, we are growing Latino political power. I hope you’ll join Latino Victory’s groundbreaking movement! Thank you, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam.
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z94j1oae2a4ilnbq01q92d764jm2minmpthcom2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgve1e1tcq5t3i3n7nc7o6gf7fh5jmup667bnksg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp7fgkahgoqe4rha1gjs6917kq2b1s94q5tvopv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znmpo66a3l7puk6dkofmfnlsa9qg73onrjs8c3dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z92b8ambtovg3c2lfs9293j5391jfk4ut4pgfkt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjf6u2je1l5ip8a0dta7a4hcdlhigmn66eff286o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhski5h6ecvgec183acqcst30eoc5fqcf3mee988_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c3g69o36cph2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: We need pro-choice activists to sign our petition now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Deadline is just HOURS away [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58400078/390968401/1853609925?sourceid=1048584&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE2NzY2Yy0wZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWqnojtse64d4gwBSggARNejsso7lj0qVo6bl6NM7Io=&emci=4fe01966-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=1f16766c-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, President Biden is delivering his second State of the Union address tonight.

We know he has called on Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ before, but we are still seeing our rights being systematically taken away.

That's why, as President Biden identifies his administration's priorities in front of the nation tonight, we want to thank him for centering the issue of abortion rights in the White House and stress that the fight for abortion access is far from over.

Our political agenda will be shaped by what President Biden identifies as his administration's priorities. Which is why continuing to keep reproductive freedom and access core to the Biden-Harris policy agenda has never been more important.

**[Are you with us? We're gathering 15,000 signatures to thank President Biden and Vice President Harris for their efforts to help codify _Roe_ and continue the work to protect reproductive freedom. Add your name now. >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58400079/390968402/1853609925?sourceid=1048584&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE2NzY2Yy0wZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWqnojtse64d4gwBSggARNejsso7lj0qVo6bl6NM7Io=&emci=4fe01966-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=1f16766c-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58400080/390968403/1853609925?sourceid=1048584&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE2NzY2Yy0wZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWqnojtse64d4gwBSggARNejsso7lj0qVo6bl6NM7Io=&emci=4fe01966-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=1f16766c-0fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Ever since the Supreme Court gave extremist anti-choice Republicans the green light to strip away our fundamental rights and freedoms, millions of Americans have faced extraordinary challenges in their lives and health decisions.

clean_body: | | | Deadline is just HOURS away Peter, President Biden is delivering his second State of the Union address tonight. We know he has called on Congress to codify Roe v. Wade before, but we are still seeing our rights being systematically taken away. That's why, as President Biden identifies his administration's priorities in front of the nation tonight, we want to thank him for centering the issue of abortion rights in the White House and stress that the fight for abortion access is far from over. Our political agenda will be shaped by what President Biden identifies as his administration's priorities. Which is why continuing to keep reproductive freedom and access core to the Biden-Harris policy agenda has never been more important. Ever since the Supreme Court gave extremist anti-choice Republicans the green light to strip away our fundamental rights and freedoms, millions of Americans have faced extraordinary challenges in their lives and health decisions. It's up to all of us to fight back with everything we've got. Too much is on the line for any of us to sit on the sidelines — not for a single second. We know you're committed to electing women who will defend and restore the right to choose for all Americans, so we're counting on you to take a stand today: With just hours left before President Biden's State of the Union address, we still need 7,540 pro-choice activists to join us. Please sign on now and urge President Biden and Congress to keep up the fight for reproductive rights: Thanks, Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Vice President of Communications, EMILYs List | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: re: Kevin McCarthy’s plan

body:
---
| | I’ll be quick. Right as you’re reading this, Kevin McCarthy and Republican leaders are about to host a MASSIVE fundraiser in D.C. They’re charging $50,000 just to attend and will raise MILLIONS in just one night. [**And every dime will go toward Republican efforts to DEFEAT our Democrats and EXPAND their far-right House Majority in the next election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58400064/390968385/1694452237?refcode=20230207_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjlmZDYwYi0wZGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTV4Fi2z8qrUpDIXGrGzvIRiic6dMwM4UdhjC6u6JV4=) We can’t stand around and watch Republicans buy themselves another term in power. [**_That’s why I’m calling on 2,500 grassroots supporters to confirm their Team Pelosi Memberships BEFORE the Republicans’ fundraiser ends. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I’m shocked, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
I just learned that Kevin McCarthy is throwing a massive fundraiser before the State of the Union tonight. He’s charging $50,000 just to attend. [_**Peter, I need to be honest: This is the kind of money that decides elections. If we don’t match McCarthy’s major cash-influx within the next 12 hours, our chances go down to take back the House. Will you rush in $14 to match McCarthy’s haul and help our Democrats retake the House? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58400635/390970512/-1810142053?refcode=20230207_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM4YmY0MS0xMWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vzFejnZVbIev7OL7WIcTf7PenckJ1WXHCfP0rhiHAf8=) Peter, I can't overstate the stakes: First, McCarthy insisted on playing political games with the livelihoods of our seniors by promising to slash Medicare and Social Security. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The Republican “death panel” is coming for Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**_Did you hear?_** After years of a global pandemic and months of worsening inflation, Republicans are trying to hold Medicare and Social Security hostage just to ram through their insane tax cuts for the rich. **We will not stand for it.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34581?refcode=em20230207-2143&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)
---
They want to set up a “death panel” to cook up news ways to eviscerate Social Security and Medicare — and figure out just how much more they can take away from retirees to fund their tax breaks for the ultra rich.
**Peter, as long as I’m in Congress and leading our progressive coalition, we will never let this happen.[At this critical moment, I need your support — it’s only with the power of our movement behind us that we can stand up to the GOP and win. Can you chip in $3 or more today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34581?refcode=em20230207-2143&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34581?refcode=em20230207-2143&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)**
Republicans have made it clear they’re willing to sacrifice our young people and seniors alike. They’re willing to let working people pay higher healthcare costs for less. And they’re doing it all to fund handouts to their donors, their corporate buddies, and their own wallets.
**Their death panel would decide how they can kill critical social safety nets and steal from working people on behalf of corporations and billionaires.**
While members of the GOP’s leadership continue to attack two of our nation’s cornerstone policies that provide for and protect the people, our progressive bloc has fought tirelessly to **_expand_** Social Security and **_guarantee_** quality healthcare for all. Just last year, we pushed once again to increase Social Security — which hasn’t happened in years.
**Republicans are showing their true colors, and the contrast couldn’t be more stark.** This is no joke, Peter, and I intend to fight their latest scheme tooth and nail. [**I need my closest supporters with me, so I’m asking you directly: can you rush a donation today as we mobilize against the GOP’s death plan?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34581?refcode=em20230207-2143amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230207-2143-footer&t=23&refcode2=2143_420207_uBC8k7&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2143%2E420207%2EuBC8k7)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

subject: Sinema weakens the state of our union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter,
Tonight President Joe Biden will make his annual State of the Union address. No thanks to Kyrsten Sinema, Democrats and President Biden have been able to secure a lot of wins for Americans since the last State of the Union. But a great deal of President Biden’s agenda got left on the chopping block, including broad investments to aid job growth and improve the lives of everyday Americans, partially because of Sinema. ******[The truth is, the state of our union would be stronger if Kyrsten Sinema hadn’t stood in the way. We need to let every Arizonan know all she’s done to block progress, and vote her out in 2024. Chip in now to make this message heard >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcwsLxFnY542cfKe6F-1a6Y6QWnxhm-sPmydEEz8YV36VDFdT0cT0HanSRmKhuMyV5OJdUNnQBnV7V37D3IDX4mW8BjTJgH2nsmjozx-HWE2hPjQ8RW3JdrGx07gQaIm58lrBIU4Ib7o_Rk6j66DrzjxOx806OS4TcHNOLGMh2ga8ckB638h6St6TeR572dQE1hISd6Jzm9-JSLcjwIhYonYdfdvc9aHc7Y_9Aq9PcQD2DN5i1bGudTXj_lJJdm7OWxnL4r9DXlo-_Cy8EFZDbwwzBiWCNmu4zCrAVSqJwPPQ/3ti/649ZilnEQg21gPg1lvBY-Q/h0/2RhTOWd6bNtSx0w8C4ex5qs_VjdOJ6bwMW8GaF6-lUc)** Following Sinema’s opposition, here are a few of the President’s proposals that failed to pass despite Democrats controlling both Houses of Congress: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcwsLxFnY542cfKe6F-1a6Yyx-hTmXEu1w91KJ4ei0AfJbqCdz_fyJVJMc7qylKqdBiqPqs_MKDL__dKuKaAtnCE9ZXJVjavAjRZA-9YPG0r0VcbKmYiuxeGOu4OZHbJY0t8APhKPUhYQRJG2REPT7qQW_FQzJcWrml25Ks1mSnwO8Pkxot64Dd-E0O6Yp2teeudxC8FZPJXVJtEpImQBis6JxNzqF2oxxb99zU8UxgSl9pcT1I5HrRfeSAiuRmrUyVBb2JHpCrGz4SStEDwIGqTew0OXWzIFXBEN-w6M46B4/3ti/649ZilnEQg21gPg1lvBY-Q/h1/C834YqGvs5k65YULJOw1WDGruPoz6Cv4eSsmZu7ykvk) Instead of working to improve the lives of everyday Americans, Sinema chose to block a provision that would have closed the carried interest tax loophole, saving Wall Street $18 billion per year in tax breaks and receiving hundreds of thousands of dollars in donations in return. ****[**Sinema sold out to the rich and wealthy corporations and we’re going to make sure everyone in Arizona knows it come election day. Help make her not even want to run in 2024 >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcwsLxFnY542cfKe6F-1a6Y2uxN2C1SMTG_cf4SscPUUXjnADU_zYIL7rImbppuWzY7peAIe_xN0AyPL_eWObCwLJwUzrTGtjiMv2aGRumINAvdmTZflI5SrluvxOcelNHY365nFRiWxSZVvLuMphdGd0UjFkxNsDSJj8e4WrIUFDWDe-x3_hABtqUleac2gQiTXBUVJGnzRnSY73G-AuA67dynEHtKILnBMZ8ZIEdxy9kceBaLB7Uhxg8IU_XnuGLrApLgiHhpWsnrmsnMODA8ZwzXWn8eAtxoZDFKxKImWM/3ti/649ZilnEQg21gPg1lvBY-Q/h2/5-sV0GBcefGmdYO5u5MUD_-BqIGinYqu7RNO2hZebHI) There’s also the filibuster, a racist procedural relic Sinema protects at all costs. Her refusal to give up the filibuster blocked many of the basic rights that would only strengthen our union, and yet in part because of her in the past year we’ve lost: ❌The Women’s Health Protection Act / restoring Roe v. Wade ❌The John Lewis Act **❌** The Equality Act ❌Immigration reform ❌Universal background checks ❌Assault weapon ban ❌Paycheck Fairness Act ❌The DISCLOSE Act pertaining to dark money ❌The CROWN Act to ban hair discrimination against Black Americans Democrats have gotten a lot done without Sinema’s help. But there’s so much more President Biden wanted to get done, that if not for Sinema, would be improving people’s lives right now. We can’t wait to replace Sinema and stop her self-serving, obstructionist tenure in the Senate. **[Can you make a donation to help us defeat her?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcwsLxFnY542cfKe6F-1a6Yzj8vGZHDfjFfqV3X8vTP6mSc47KZrg8f9_l3nuMtxExxFagup35AlfOzVmOhTquB5SYWBU93n9cvdVTpJzyYglX1PSuYKOLLNoHObeYSnasDZxagdWb0gDSu-HRHOKMxRYotZhMqOPLbDzlKaKfH0qDVQpMiovi26_6bEntmpm55b9GvdMYMoXrTU2S7bq6RM7X96NRvoG5BerFWM72FCmJSITVdE5oBGB7Z3pNJELHNLMbsIARD4J_usSIaR_hlp5wJub_I0qiaG6ax8vmLWY/3ti/649ZilnEQg21gPg1lvBY-Q/h3/AmCoKw9tSmZ9bAnKw3FwB5gbmr_ad6ZpCedAiG5ThVc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $7 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcQfSXQ5zLZsJMIxjhQadlPS6rR0KXsfovGLcfhT-pH-tAJrwPj_SUc1eRLxbyu31ttjQ2-qZmcwabzdFY5NFsjlw2Emd51jDK_lm0SMPVMiyo-B4MNDWInHrRc-gYTyEvefaWMIf3NhhjR8cI8dlvcw3LFB-q-Lg-SAJvUvZWoY2yK3wlKUVHq5R42mviST-AEe7jwZir2UoqYTYn5vhFLgA0yIjBj1NykqLPpgTvdXSqKl9aljZifdMV7OM_CJJnSofveX-y_TOI6Wry387JGg3qroz9fFU6t_8DhUtpci05Bj7So84eO30o1skXwYeqDcaH0BQFLXzvYIdAlzPq8Q/3ti/649ZilnEQg21gPg1lvBY-Q/h4/vBvQ9UtdhQIwFehN-hdBHaRqfbV2W4tViencc-YefgE)

We can’t wait to replace Sinema and stop her self-serving, obstructionist tenure in the Senate. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . Friend, every day the spy balloon was in the air was a win for China and a defeat for America on the world stage. | | | [](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=31953d81ec9141f2a2d6c429d94337ce&_e=98xK58zKERcoHAcGu21po7wp8ED9r6G8LPjsPECMtFaHW-M3E_veNYikvLhGXChvUzClmXFYvJCAGBR_G7vBBgffZWNJO79IyvDb3jF9FSN_6dwcbfpacflbawmW4Nljo9FkNWd-L7BuwsXzo85-0xwK0VhniOXWN-dZyJE3lRre3HeTlytKPCo200ufB9hG1NVUkaAwM5R-mU403JEbAgd4rJuYzeIvudHGzqEBjg5EZ3yx34obkPehsPN7rxuo37wj0TyEw2uIhlu0mHUbX9j-qXqpbeRTazXknvad4DuVwxh5-KgXpmMhkNHqhhPDPqv1Ath9gIXS-evHQuNZ9FFPTpCO6LuOOkVzWKVF7JDTZuD7HCMFPnGNZOpQce2V)

Friend, China’s leaders claim the spy balloon that floated across America is a harmless “civilian weather balloon,” but we all know what’s _really_ happened. **This was a deliberate attempt to undermine our national security –– and President Biden did China’s bidding by allowing the spy balloon to stay in the air**** __for days_._**
---
[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=31953d81ec9141f2a2d6c429d94337ce&_e=98xK58zKERcoHAcGu21po7wp8ED9r6G8LPjsPECMtFaHW-M3E_veNYikvLhGXChvUzClmXFYvJCAGBR_G7vBBgffZWNJO79IyvDb3jF9FSN_6dwcbfpacflbawmW4Nljo9FkNWd-L7BuwsXzo85-0xwK0VhniOXWN-dZyJE3lRre3HeTlytKPCo200ufB9hG1NVUkaAwM5R-mU403JEbAgd4rJuYzeIvudHGzqEBjg56CJ7GRvNAK8_7NyGiKbWYpkJgI_2Dff5_1uzvd3CEacCAeLF4I1hfhPHc7-YTbowZ7aKVIlVkHeg-ZITstG91wk8s09AxvkIripAYVmZUHDhqbWKeWnxYVlNFgrj6Ed_Atc7Cy3J07MfUx-el1FoX)
---
Every day the spy balloon was in the air was a **win** for China and a **defeat** for America on the world stage. Friend, we must send a loud and clear message that we won’t tolerate a hostile enemy spying in our own airspace. Violations like this are _exactly_ why Darin is leading the change in Congress to hold China accountable and keep America secure from any outside efforts to weaken our country. [**_Add your name to stand with Darin against China spying within our borders >>>_**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=31953d81ec9141f2a2d6c429d94337ce&_e=98xK58zKERcoHAcGu21po7wp8ED9r6G8LPjsPECMtFaHW-M3E_veNYikvLhGXChvUzClmXFYvJCAGBR_G7vBBgffZWNJO79IyvDb3jF9FSN_6dwcbfpacflbawmW4Nljo9FkNWd-L7BuwsXzo85-0xwK0VhniOXWN-dZyJE3lRre3HeTlytKPCo200ufB9hG1NVUkaAwM5R-mU403JEbAgd4rJuYzeIvudHGzqEBjg7ABtlAju6qOpeQVaXDBr_la3qUXOuP7f8hNLl77vPWccageqQeStjPJH5KF0xrryFOZjaSWV_dephmcMGnongVKvBewvk_1LqZjpnea4O1IRsgjrmoU9iNFA7Yb80Z42tcG1FPDor4afNyLEX4xJKH)

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

name: Becca Balint
subject: Tonight, I’m proud to have Bill Lippert by my side.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Bill’s bravery as an openly gay legislator paved the way for LGBTQ people like me to believe in ourselves, our voices, and our ability to lead. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420278/391013577/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Hi Peter, I wanted to send you a quick note before I attend President Biden’s State of the Union address tonight. As a Member of Congress, I am able to bring one guest along with me to attend this speech. **Tonight, I’m proud to have Bill Lippert by my side.** Bill represented Chittenden County in the state legislature for almost 30 years. In the 1980s, Bill helped organize Burlington’s first Pride parade, and was a founding board member of Outright Vermont – one of the leading organizations serving LGBTQ youth in Vermont to this day. He also founded the Samara Fund, a community foundation dedicated to improving the lives of Vermont’s LGBTQ citizens. **While Vermont is known for being a welcoming, progressive, and forward-thinking place, it took courage to get here – _courage from people like Bill._** As the only openly gay member of the Vermont General Assembly, he was instrumental in making Vermont the first state to grant civil unions to same-sex couples in 2000. Nearly a decade later, he played a critical role in guaranteeing full same-sex marriage rights through the state legislature. **Bill’s bravery as an openly gay legislator paved the way for LGBTQ people like me to believe in ourselves, our voices, and our ability to lead. I am so honored to have him by my side this evening as we reflect on the state of our union under President Biden. ** Bill and I know there is still so much work left to achieve full equality, and to defend our hard-fought progress. But tonight, I’m reminded of just how important it is to lead with love in our fight for freedom and justice. You can tune in to tonight’s State of the Union address **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420279/391013579/-803653937?v=gzcBTUvVp7M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)** beginning at 9PM. Yours, Becca Balint
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420280/391013580/537668883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420282/391013581/-1209379614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420283/391013583/411952208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)
Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. **Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to serve Vermont in Congress. **If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58420284/391013584/-702467740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU0YTM2ZS00MmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_wp6oOwPjsfMukxQmn33MwLJBuKtccLa58DOH3gHrfo=&emci=3e682a98-3fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=90e4a36e-42a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=P7jwoJeWWoOJmiPAeqrTaoPaWnw0Tzs6Q9MTdxmGzBcoKwLsZmuT8JCw3XERg2YHaYYhDm1etiOS%2FZL4mZl6VcAnjXSMJlk0ryclU2W6r0pNo3Z20ekChsdx5xSzSosHQAPdzlvHN0UjTVRNrptr4NbgOcFFh2e7OrgUQdULC3%2FmuWmxGBaVsZD1bpKksZvjmGsK40Pn8BqE5vNc2oLx6PVKBbw%2FTSTZ0aLC9V9y8SZY3WcdJnZYGxjPxFInM9tnqIQdzdLxGsth0KwytRxuAz3peL1YsYYDZveNIK%2F2jE2WwvnTz%2Fn1CTLQdhA0Q1luZdd%2F0m6zSk1NVHFhzhN07KGpbmAQdmJcftVqJVdab2AO5bvmL1C8%2Ft2uStLL%2BoSYQVUTN46mpnSveqGLRNLJSH4c2hA6bpolH%2FjZTjXJ%2BlRhJ6EBhaBvQgFl%2B2VYPHi6). As the only openly gay member of the Vermont General Assembly, he was instrumental in making Vermont the first state to grant civil unions to same-sex couples in 2000. Nearly a decade later, he played a critical role in guaranteeing full same-sex marriage rights through the state legislature. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I'm giving the State of the Union rebuttal but I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path

| |
---
| | | This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I'm giving the State of the Union response tonight, but I need your help.

Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path of destructive Democrat policies and unmitigated disasters. There is a LOT going on that I could address, but I need to know which issues matter most to YOU.

The only way to truly know the state of the union is by going directly to the voices that matter most - yours.

Will you please take 30 seconds to send me your TOP concerns?

I really need your input before I take the stage tonight. It would really mean a lot to me and to the country to know that my speech and concerns are coming directly from YOU.

Please respond here ASAP so I have time to read through it all!

---

Thank you for your input!

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

clean_body: Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path | | | | | This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I'm giving the State of the Union response tonight, but I need your help. Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path of destructive Democrat policies and unmitigated disasters. There is a LOT going on that I could address, but I need to know which issues matter most to YOU. The only way to truly know the state of the union is by going directly to the voices that matter most - yours. Will you please take 30 seconds to send me your TOP concerns? I really need your input before I take the stage tonight. It would really mean a lot to me and to the country to know that my speech and concerns are coming directly from YOU. Please respond here ASAP so I have time to read through it all! | | Thank you for your input! name: Team Tina
subject: Governor Kotek’s plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter — Tina’s mission as Governor will always be to deliver results and move the state forward, so that every Oregonian, no matter their race or zip code, can have the same opportunities.

That means building more housing and reducing homelessness, improving access to mental health and addiction services, and ensuring that Oregon’s children are better served by the state.

That’s why Tina released detailed budget recommendations for the Oregon State Legislature, a roadmap that will put the state on a path to solving our most pressing challenges.

Here’s what you need to know:

On Housing and Homelessness:

*
Governor
Kotek’s
plan
involves
investing
in
strategies
to
help
reduce
unsheltered
homelessness,
rehouse
Oregonians,
build
and
preserve
more
affordable
housing,
and
increase
homeownership.
This
means
investing
millions
of
dollars
in
getting
Oregonians
living
in
tents
off
the
streets
and
into
shelters
and
permanent,
supportive
housing.
Along
with
providing
incentives
to
build
and
grow
affordable
housing
throughout
the
state
so
that
no
Oregonian
has
to
find
themselves
homeless
in
the
future.

On Mental Health and Addiction Services:

*
The
plan
will
disrupt
the
harmful
and
expensive
homelessness-jail-hospital
pipeline,
decrease
preventable
deaths
from
substance
use
and
mental
health
needs,
and
stabilize
the
behavioral
health
workforce.
To
help
accomplish
all
this,
the
budget
will
make
continued
investments
in
substance
use
treatment
and
behavioral
health
provider
incentives,
as
well
as
increase
funds
for
mental
health
residential
capacity
and
improving
Oregon’s
crisis
prevention
system.

On Early Learning and K-12 Education

*
The
plan
ensures
Oregon
children
are
better
served
by
K-12
schools
—
focusing
on
improving
student
literacy
and
stabilizing
early
childhood
services.
This
involves
increasing
the
State
School
Fund
and
fully
funding
the
High
School
Success
program
to
improve
graduation
rates
and
give
students
the
tools
to
be
career
and
college
ready.
The
plan
makes
additional
investments
to
increase
literacy
rates,
expand
summer
enrichment
programs,
and
enhance
early
learning
programs,
so
that
all
students,
no
matter
their
background,
start
their
education
on
the
right
foot.

It’s a plan we’re proud of, Peter. It rises to the challenges facing Oregon by getting back to the basics, working in collaboration with communities, making smart investments where necessary, and staying the course where prudent.

The next step in making this budget a reality is to show the Oregon Legislature that the people support it and feel empowered by its vision. Can you take a moment to add your name and show that the public is behind Tina’s plan and her mission to create a brighter future for Oregon? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/dvEi0szJG0iyTZfjkxlb2w2]

Thank you for raising your voice to make Oregon a better place to live, work and thrive.

— Team Tina

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-feb2023]
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242

clean_body: Tina for Oregon [] Peter — Tina’s mission as Governor will always be to deliver results and move the state forward, so that every Oregonian, no matter their race or zip code, can have the same opportunities. That means building more housing and reducing homelessness, improving access to mental health and addiction services, and ensuring that Oregon’s children are better served by the state. That’s why Tina released detailed budget recommendations for the Oregon State Legislature, a roadmap that will put the state on a path to solving our most pressing challenges. Here’s what you need to know: On Housing and Homelessness: Governor Kotek’s plan involves investing in strategies to help reduce unsheltered homelessness, rehouse Oregonians, build and preserve more affordable housing, and increase homeownership. This means investing millions of dollars in getting Oregonians living in tents off the streets and into shelters and permanent, supportive housing. Along with providing incentives to build and grow affordable housing throughout the state so that no Oregonian has to find themselves homeless in the future. On Mental Health and Addiction Services: The plan will disrupt the harmful and expensive homelessness-jail-hospital pipeline, decrease preventable deaths from substance use and mental health needs, and stabilize the behavioral health workforce. To help accomplish all this, the budget will make continued investments in substance use treatment and behavioral health provider incentives, as well as increase funds for mental health residential capacity and improving Oregon’s crisis prevention system. On Early Learning and K-12 Education * The plan ensures Oregon children are better served by K-12 schools — focusing on improving student literacy and stabilizing early childhood services. This involves increasing the State School Fund and fully funding the High School Success program to improve graduation rates and give students the tools to be career and college ready. The plan makes additional investments to increase literacy rates, expand summer enrichment programs, and enhance early learning programs, so that all students, no matter their background, start their education on the right foot. It’s a plan we’re proud of, Peter. It rises to the challenges facing Oregon by getting back to the basics, working in collaboration with communities, making smart investments where necessary, and staying the course where prudent. The next step in making this budget a reality is to show the Oregon Legislature that the people support it and feel empowered by its vision. Can you take a moment to add your name and show that the public is behind Tina’s plan and her mission to create a brighter future for Oregon? [] Thank you for raising your voice to make Oregon a better place to live, work and thrive. — Team Tina DONATE [] Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 tinafororegon.com [] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com] Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

Peter, over the course of **44 hours, three mass shootings in California claimed the lives of 19 people. **

The first tragedy was in Monterey Park, where a celebration of the Lunar New Year in the heart of the city’s Asian American community ended in 11 lives lost. The next was in a rural seaside town in northern California, where seven immigrant laborers were killed. And the third tragedy in less than 48 hours was in Oakland, where one person was killed and seven others were wounded during the filming of a music video.

**Our nation’s bloody history of gun violence has proven time and time again that assault weapons are the weapon of choice for mass shooters – and yet we are _still_ fighting tooth and nail against the gun lobby and its favorite politicians to get these military-style weapons of war off the streets of America. **
**Peter, I refuse to back down from this fight, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence.**

So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action?
| | **Should Congress ban military-style assault weapons?**
---

Peter,

**President Biden will deliver his State of the Union address to Congress tonight.**

This is the first state of the Union since Republicans took control of the House – and it’s coming at a critical time in our nation’s history.

There is so much at stake right now, from abortion rights and voting rights to climate action and gun safety. And with Republicans threatening to derail our economy and undermine Social Security and Medicare, this speech couldn’t be more important.

Tonight, we’ll hear from Biden about his priorities for 2023 and how he plans to deliver on our Democratic agenda. **But first, we want to hear from YOU.**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

body:
| | | Peter — At 8:45 PM ET/5:45 PM PT, we’ll be gathering over Zoom to watch President Biden’s State of the Union address — and the WFP Response delivered by Representative Delia Ramirez! **Join us to hear our vision for a working families agenda in 2023.[RSVP now to join the SOTU watch party and WFP Response with Delia Ramirez!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig7pxp8_8FRyBP9qmx2KXN0hSHNOFr3OEPWmEgw3O_9SVoBwaJqIhL7p04McveUtMAjzAQsnBgqfqAxHWl1YuEdtZOkELA21byBPt--kj8g1DduJJKfvWxJInR-AqITzpfVk8ZDhAsdmBsK_pchSqCt9G87sNX_fc0X9emCu9znh_3y7BiyQ4Vl-XotedUnMkdEWgumaDXQTGSjOVPlAXSxI/3ti/gHP_ldDOSpGaWRrD9SAw9g/h0/zmCwwq7ObT8Yh1n7vVjypk2mG-HoayVHBva93-l07mU)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig7pxp8_8FRyBP9qmx2KXN0hYzfduNEkl7IFW8YcpEZhRaaH7bD0-9Qm3gZ2sH58q44a6HSFoy6_SCEBweXDe1AbTDtJjS1R_qxgV-uGwXH9ne1fHZv-evfzUTch068MWlsyHBVS_d7alPmcMlYQVk5toKx5E6WsORpvJ6pTvOcts5_eigdntXOat-H_KAwusRLV20fH1egjq3ldN_6r3jb4/3ti/gHP_ldDOSpGaWRrD9SAw9g/h1/u_zImIMET8nxRfxTKdQH3_9Qg4V6nvunPr1cl0c7HbA) **[RSVP now****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqEnpyi3VIfNqqfZEtRKis7qGyvfxWVPeh1fLzejH0Ig7pxp8_8FRyBP9qmx2KXN0hsPh6XjnShr38MEy9uw06EY8qbJwHdXO6ctIev2YEOC1cjw9u3yVwTA29V_kGKVUd2Kawc0-pPpESI64frPoF9ugLM-V1OmGJVSEDE3dM1rlKDXqwN8fk94HOlvqzn8qBs4mhPue8rsTLpvD1zdalmYhn4UNa4U1RTX7ijcCJaV5-hFvtib8LrBRZXaYNIL1A/3ti/gHP_ldDOSpGaWRrD9SAw9g/h2/zNhRY12f6wjpG8w99pPn9WH_mnE8bK8y3wC-C6xngOA)** We’re so honored to have Rep. Ramirez deliver the WFP Response this year. The new Congresswoman from Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District and the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest, Rep. Ramirez will share what we’re fighting for this year, and what our priorities will be once we take back the House. Her speech will be streamed LIVE on our virtual watch party and on WFP’s social media channels in both English and Spanish. ASL interpretation will also be provided. During the watch party, we’ll also be joined by special guests **Kendra Brooks,** whose Working Families Party win in 2019 made her Philly’s first third-party City Councilmember, and **Nicolas O’Rourke,** PAWFP’s Organizing Director and candidate for Philadelphia City Council. clean_body: | | | Peter — At 8:45 PM ET/5:45 PM PT, we’ll be gathering over Zoom to watch President Biden’s State of the Union address — and the WFP Response delivered by Representative Delia Ramirez! Join us to hear our vision for a working families agenda in 2023. We’re so honored to have Rep. Ramirez deliver the WFP Response this year. The new Congresswoman from Illinois’s 3rd Congressional District and the first Latina elected to Congress from the Midwest, Rep. Ramirez will share what we’re fighting for this year, and what our priorities will be once we take back the House. Her speech will be streamed LIVE on our virtual watch party and on WFP’s social media channels in both English and Spanish. ASL interpretation will also be provided. During the watch party, we’ll also be joined by special guests Kendra Brooks, whose Working Families Party win in 2019 made her Philly’s first third-party City Councilmember, and Nicolas O’Rourke, PAWFP’s Organizing Director and candidate for Philadelphia City Council. We’re excited to support both Kendra and Nicolas, who are running on the Working Families Party ballot line, and if they win, will defeat all Republicans on the Philadelphia City Council. Or if you just want to join us for Rep. Ramirez's speech, text SOTU to 30403, and we’ll text you a link to the livestream right when it’s time to tune in! (Please note: her speech will likely begin after 10pm ET!) In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. If you haven’t already, Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: TSA Director Accused of Fraud, Waste for Unlawfully Deploying Assets to Mexican Border
body: The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... The pay raises come on the heels of a recent report that noted numerous problems with the TSA. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Catching you up on this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I am the ONLY incumbent Democratic governor up for re-election this year. Hey Peter — Andy here!

**January has come and gone, and a lot has happened in this race for governor. I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates.**

Twelve Republicans have officially filed to run against me this year. They have already spent over a million dollars, and one opponent has even gone up with ads on the air targeting my record! That's not including the tens of thousands of dollars in outside money that has been raised to attack the work we’ve done together.

We have a tough fight ahead of us – but I have good news. We've started off the new year in a strong spot. New polling shows I'm leading the pack, and a majority of Kentuckians say they approve of the job my administration and I have done. We need to keep up our momentum and ensure we're ready for whatever attacks and outside spending come our way.

Can I count on you to make a donation to my re-election campaign? Any dollar amount you donate will help me compete with my 12 opponents and protect Kentucky's progress >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-february-23**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58409267/390982075/-500812825?refcode=em23_230207_rsnd_fnd_gq_nopn_unf_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230207_rsnd_fnd_gq_nopn_unf_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVlM2M3Yy0xZGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DHoP8Kuz08hd7pXpT130BSc2xaEFqzwt13dXogL3uyM=)

Grateful to have your support,

Andy

clean_body: I am the ONLY incumbent Democratic governor up for re-election this year. Hey Peter — Andy here! January has come and gone, and a lot has happened in this race for governor. I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates. Twelve Republicans have officially filed to run against me this year. They have already spent over a million dollars, and one opponent has even gone up with ads on the air targeting my record! That's not including the tens of thousands of dollars in outside money that has been raised to attack the work we’ve done together. We have a tough fight ahead of us – but I have good news. We've started off the new year in a strong spot. New polling shows I'm leading the pack, and a majority of Kentuckians say they approve of the job my administration and I have done. We need to keep up our momentum and ensure we're ready for whatever attacks and outside spending come our way. Can I count on you to make a donation to my re-election campaign? Any dollar amount you donate will help me compete with my 12 opponents and protect Kentucky's progress >> = Grateful to have your support, Andy | PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

We’re gearing up for 2023 – and we need your help. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58413194/390984311/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODNmZjEzMi0yMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gZAYMkNlOqiiFQTVwpDOyt8Hqku8nQ3Dmu9clMX7MM0=&emci=9aa9d0de-5ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b83ff132-20a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Friends, Last year was incredible. From raising the minimum wage to $15/hr in deeply conservative Nebraska to expanding Medicaid to over 40,000 people in South Dakota, _2022 was the busiest and most successful year our team at the Fairness Project has ever had_. We are so proud of all the work we were able to do to help voters across the country use direct democracy to enact real change in their community. **But now, we’re gearing up for 2023 – and we need your help.** While ballot initiatives have a proven track record of progressive wins, it can often take months or even years to get a question up for a vote. Whether it’s conducting polling to gauge public opinion or gathering petition signatures, it takes a LOT of work to put a ballot campaign together. [**That’s why we’re rebuilding our Campaign Startup Fund to power this critical work. Replenishing this fund will give us the resources we need to lay the groundwork for our upcoming campaigns in 2023 and 2024. clean_body: We’re gearing up for 2023 – and we need your help. | | Friends, Last year was incredible. From raising the minimum wage to $15/hr in deeply conservative Nebraska to expanding Medicaid to over 40,000 people in South Dakota, 2022 was the busiest and most successful year our team at the Fairness Project has ever had. We are so proud of all the work we were able to do to help voters across the country use direct democracy to enact real change in their community. But now, we’re gearing up for 2023 – and we need your help. While ballot initiatives have a proven track record of progressive wins, it can often take months or even years to get a question up for a vote. Whether it’s conducting polling to gauge public opinion or gathering petition signatures, it takes a LOT of work to put a ballot campaign together. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = So much is at stake for our democracy this year, team. Gridlock in Congress has gotten even worse , meaning states continue to serve as the battleground for so many of our most sacred rights. Health care, higher wages, abortion — all protections where voters are fed up with Washington and want to pass the policies they need here and now. Every winning ballot measure campaign is the result of years of research, education, and mobilizing voters. That’s why it’s critical that we start the work early to ensure we set ourselves up for success. = = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:

| | |

## My Response To The SOTU
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10329.1.db69d066a5949588e19d0351d479fc68)
---
You can view my response to **Former Vice President Joe Biden** 's State of the Union Address here: [https://youtu.be/9MHPIZNnOxQ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10330.1.ae1a9fbb780e63cce9d47694ede105cd)
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10331.1.9278f8766d78d23c13b75131ae506f17), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10332.1.74ced862cb0dde251e4565430484c312), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10333.1.0d7491515d95311d461475c9a0988987), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10334.1.485fb19d2ea2b5f53ee839606261341d), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10335.1.3036b92340f7a4dfdb2b0a15418063b8) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10336.1.a5e522e5410fcedccfe0237806ec6910)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10337.1.1e0edfd51b3c8e58372351f027ea1ba6)
| | [ Responding To The SOTU ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10338.1.fadfd395fbb79d2c584f8d1356f12483)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10339.1.654d3f8e1489fd87860db1d37004bb45)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10340.1.0138c279189c14ea5787a46d34e07b3c) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10341.1.ed70266fcfe99b6495729b1bb423a8f4)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10342.1.22cc9a31835f02a2dae98ca8af530ba9) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10343.1.7cb1f1a35dd0dcc4cc95171609271c63) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10344.1.40a1eef44e97311d9b104265243a1edb) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10345.1.d2c2ab3da6a81b9474ff8d02ad2bc83e) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10346.1.7bf070a2ad520e324a8ccdf5410b64ec) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17757559.10347.1.0a3cbbc2a93769dcb3495747f8938ba2) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
---
©2023 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK 74145
---
