body:
Let me explain:

Hey Team, I’m sure that your inbox is full of emails from campaigns asking for your support. (Mine is too!) And candidly, yes, this is also one of those emails. Believe it or not, if we’re going to keep this seat blue and have a shot at retaking our House majority next year, it’s really important that we plan ahead and hit our early fundraising targets. If you already know you’re with us, I’d love to have your support. **[(Here is a link to donate!)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58413866/390984781/-1200498302?refcode=email_020723_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQ3ZGRjOS0yMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmt8xq0bC7SDiggoxc1oFFTrDsswm6oNLWoOSqNjR3o=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58413867/390984782/-1200498302?refcode=email_020723_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQ3ZGRjOS0yMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmt8xq0bC7SDiggoxc1oFFTrDsswm6oNLWoOSqNjR3o=)
---
**But if you need more of an explanation, here is important context for why I need to ask for your help:**
* Multiple right-wing super PACs attacked me in the home stretch of the November election, and fighting back took almost everything we had.
* We need to be prepared to face even fiercer attacks in the next election, and we are starting nearly from scratch.
* When I was elected, I promised I’d fight for the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked in Washington. Every day, I’m working to do exactly that.
* In just the last month, House Republicans have proposed plans to restrict abortion rights, hammer working families with a 30% national sales tax, gut Social Security, hike the cost of insulin, and raise health insurance premiums.
* I’m fighting back against that backwards agenda with everything I’ve got, and I’m doing everything I can to make progress on the issues we care about. But I can’t do it without a strong grassroots team behind me.

**Team, if we’re going to keep up the fight, protect this seat, and regain Democratic control of Congress in the next election, I need your help. We can’t be complacent or let Republicans catch us flatfooted — the stakes are far too high for that.**
[**Knowing all of that context, can I count on you to pitch in any amount to our campaign today? Even a $5 contribution would go a long way toward helping us reach our shared goals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58413868/390984783/572529940?refcode=email_020723_context&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQ3ZGRjOS0yMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmt8xq0bC7SDiggoxc1oFFTrDsswm6oNLWoOSqNjR3o=)

subject: My State of the Union guest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58414336/390988072/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_FOT_GEN_AC_20230207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjU2MjEyMi0yMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9AgpKtyEYPF5kMo_z6clvq7wR6afWHapReZNznc5u74=&emci=875901e9-13a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f6562122-22a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Folks — Tonight, President Joe Biden will address our nation and share a strong record of accomplishments — from the bipartisan infrastructure bill to a historically low unemployment rate. I’m honored to have invited a State of the Union guest who works every day to lift up New Mexicans and represent our shared values as a country, Charlene Bencomo. Charlene is the executive director of Bold Futures, a New Mexico-based organization that is building an inclusive New Mexico where women and people of color make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives, and everyone thrives. Bold Futures advocates for policy changes in the New Mexico state legislature, conducts critical research, and leads organizing efforts toward a better future for New Mexicans. Charlene and the folks working with Bold Futures have helped make New Mexico a pro-choice state and a haven for people seeking abortion care from nearby states with restrictive laws. **New Mexico sets an example for how we can protect reproductive rights on the federal level.** It’s thanks to years of advocacy and organizing from groups like Bold Futures that the state legislature repealed New Mexico’s outdated abortion ban. The _Respect New Mexico Women and Families Act_ keeps reproductive healthcare decisions in the hands of women and their doctors. **[Charlene and Bold Futures are continuing to advocate for more reproductive health protections under New Mexico law, but they are counting on your support to keep up this critical work. Can you pitch in any amount to Bold Futures to fuel their efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58414339/390988075/1423793128?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_FOT_GEN_AC_20230207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjU2MjEyMi0yMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9AgpKtyEYPF5kMo_z6clvq7wR6afWHapReZNznc5u74=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Bold Futures will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58414340/390988078/1423793128?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_FOT_GEN_AC_20230207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjU2MjEyMi0yMmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9AgpKtyEYPF5kMo_z6clvq7wR6afWHapReZNznc5u74=)

Peter, A Trump-appointed conservative judge in Texas is expected to rule any day now on a case regarding medication abortion brought forward by a group of anti-choice extremists. The groups are seeking to reverse FDA approval of mifepristone — one drug of the two-step medication abortion regimen, which accounts for **more than 50% of abortions in the United States. ** If the judge rules against mifepristone, this ban would take effect **nationwide** , even in states that protect the right to abortion like California and New York. It would have disastrous consequences for abortion access in the U.S., leading to backlogs at clinics and more unsafe at-home abortions. Congress needs to act to protect access to medication abortion NOW. Senator Tina Smith and Congresswoman Cori Bush have re-introduced the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act,_ which would protect current FDA guidelines and keep the prescription of medication abortion pills legal. [_**Please, add your name to our petition demanding Congress to pass the _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_ immediately, before conservative judges strip away more of our rights.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58414793/390991218/-58690530?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230207_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhNmEwNjUtMjNhNy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tKZt20w2Ip-nW7tSB8CNId0eU8n59P2yb2aPk50qn_w=&emci=93f4e4e2-1aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=75a6a065-23a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [PROTECT ACCESS TO ABORTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58414795/390991227/-58690530?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230207_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzVhNmEwNjUtMjNhNy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tKZt20w2Ip-nW7tSB8CNId0eU8n59P2yb2aPk50qn_w=&emci=93f4e4e2-1aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=75a6a065-23a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: | = Peter, A Trump-appointed conservative judge in Texas is expected to rule any day now on a case regarding medication abortion brought forward by a group of anti-choice extremists. The groups are seeking to reverse FDA approval of mifepristone — one drug of the two-step medication abortion regimen, which accounts for more than 50% of abortions in the United States. If the judge rules against mifepristone, this ban would take effect nationwide , even in states that protect the right to abortion like California and New York. It would have disastrous consequences for abortion access in the U.S., leading to backlogs at clinics and more unsafe at-home abortions. Congress needs to act to protect access to medication abortion NOW. Senator Tina Smith and Congresswoman Cori Bush have re-introduced the Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act, which would protect current FDA guidelines and keep the prescription of medication abortion pills legal. | Thanks for taking action, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| |
# **STATE OF THE UNION**
Good morning,

I’m so honored to be representing Arizona’s 6th Congressional District in the House of Representatives, and I couldn’t have done it without you. We are already hard at work in Congress making the case for why the **American Dream** is worth defending.

**In fact, I’ve been asked to deliver the Republican response to tonight’s State of the Union address in SPANISH**. This will be the biggest speech of my career, and it would mean so much to me if you would tune in.

The speech will air on Univision and other stations following President Biden's State of the Union address tonight, Feb. 7th.

And if you can, [**send in your donation before MIDNIGHT tonight to help us reach new voters**](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=2df11633c3&e=659fba240e) and deliver on our promises to the American People.

Together, we can ensure that all Americans have the opportunity to thrive and live out their own American Dream.

God Bless,

Juan

| This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I'm giving the State of the Union response tonight, but I need your help.

Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path of destructive Democrat policies and unmitigated disasters. There is a LOT going on that I could address, but I need to know which issues matter most to YOU.

The only way to truly know the state of the union is by going directly to the voices that matter most - yours.

Will you please take 30 seconds to send me your TOP concerns?

I really need your input before I take the stage tonight. It would really mean a lot to me and to the country to know that my speech and concerns are coming directly from YOU.

Please respond here ASAP so I have time to read through it all!

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLAc6mPFjZWvhliyU5Fr_jTWq3LbBetb-PZSJEnDebHTdMTsZNrRXl-KB9qmh958b22xiaFRFBpd_znNxb72CG4RRQHf1vJhJuQ3NgaueP2p6xZrGybP4LLvZ2tRex94O-rGBh_VedtqMSC5e4MChPJA%3D)

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLCmd3HbaggOnEiStmtm-iLsYzcACbkZN00vTskQt6HKLsPU3dXkzk-H-45D4OKe-J5kEFwDuibFhQ7EQumF0TwK1WHcD7Cnb5i5ZWi5IxsAK46YLxvbRAUEFXnl6LKXWjIz0sl65lPAttTO8pExIKYY%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLISJtNpF91YfXIQMnf09PR62XEp5AahGnKIH9QnXYmBO_hNLe7-40WCqOsF_M4RzVObmEd3ZN7SzK5_-BaKrsFGw3BT_rA7dtE9zo_P2rf8UmvdK-4NB_uQdB90Tuv9G9OuyaY35zyt_Xv3L3HC6--g%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLBGtb0ZkpzuSV1DCtsY6o_jupxU02tRBbS4foO_d79v_PSdhfUt5a9slrFrW-MMU42GaKU42njhF2NSltz1XBcHfPoTElTBSr2SsNRvqWKRjaU9NuD9t4T8lsNqGxj3cDgXjYWxg_27ZHbhkbFajL4g%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLA6Ggd1Ond4pIvnDNClXgmsjP7xQo-_wLftpBIYR_szjT5-9cxrHEP-zl5oX8uxprNMXYfzEfa9I3S7_X2Xp0TtVISJQChqfcjhHf6PlR9_uPRSrMlWK1D9OySSCzhDBRH0keL4pP1GVSjUQr008OTI%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLNhKa6zJF7RvN-_ATqAye2E1XbkcjuIAULquCw6S_PNOTyd1Mz5wOKVkxoyzbLpdBGGLhWXRqtIrMj9LEWrHob9ceaqhDwvRVrSg6iBPTv5_P-tYpfdd6FC89LzBXYdrJELp5b2YTTqVe-A7_CEl1Ek%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4dbde984c60848b1994faf8c8bd96e36&_e=AMHpvC9i2DDX9HTOF1EcKHMlXfJC8hGLQDvpq29dwZrtYEAhfBtSFgUXkvpYhGLYLmPqmluVswUDTYfbmAhYxnzshmaUB8b3Bzi2S6Fxkmk-_CxEJe9IlnegUT6oo4I2fv8Um2MUymj6YvSLngvTLFRhjCQVzN0_prLvoIBwIkmzfLFxNZ6GiCPfKFYr1PK3b6YbN-icOa8SuV6CqcXBp81_H6871T_VFa1CVbkS3bX3b_GxA10jpPa6FU7o3edgLuC78VZoLZtJlTFVsLI9DFyf_rph2A6r7jJHawYkv5g%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Team Josh Hawley
subject: Pelosi Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Congress functions to serve YOU! We enact legislation, declare war, confirm or reject appointments, and investigate vast areas of government. Nowhere in the constitution is a mandate to get rich, but you wouldn't know that by looking at career politicians like Nancy Pelosi.
Despite earning a legislator's wage, Pelosi’s net worth has ballooned to over 100 MILLION dollars.
How is that possible? Could it be that she is one of the many career politicians who beats the markets by leveraging information not available to the general public? I believe that politicians should have to play by the same rules as the public, but I want to hear from YOU.
[DO YOU BELIEVE POLITICIANS SHOULD PLAY BY THE SAME RULES AS EVERYBODY ELSE?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=9cd9d7a16e6643e2b3e7ceef498e5521&_e=nn4GYPswv1U1Qel3sy3LaFyZ7ghne_mz8HLzo1j5AEHA08n5Zkhpa3iX11U6p0Q-vfasK-JLqnBtAZ69nYAySYWS7GZTTMNdpux-onLYypzQ3eJPbsqDSBctYO079fvRqwfmz2QxHuF8sjyoWKaj894fmgjtJnZt9iPpAM-x9wsahwHs_Swg0okpsk7HB3c07uw8-0S_eQi-SBcmhudRF5fL0WCeRotYIF9Go0Wo1jeWCPxYj_Qxw2CoDX6lY_KpMKxfXghSetSZUxj4Ynwitl3n2l0sc8YU-fRVz6HGAX5BQN2CVyvz90aEg_sEmSvatljV0e4ctFiV3A6RE0fygXEfQFfyF1uo2Rlj5jI_JWfOpaJuTuugbJv0BuHSoPKd)

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b915f877bc474e7ea0fb602dae303e12&_e=5pvMvAWUpyJPJuFzioOfyjEPab_Oql9zjWsKWNy5KB9znrswzpSZy4HCx3ilKdw8oXIy4wjRz-7wROnIlE2wz-5G3b1zRKixwcP60uiyf9-vJoPkM_XIVw1FeLNOE356WUFQ0k9Ps0RyLnc2ydBlshX4negmPSa17Ras8haSyJx0MSm3oVrB6HdJqae6lPJiX12y9d_VwwrcpNGTrw1qoHF1bzU3ZhGFhVzC6x-Vy7H76KVep4e5q1l_fxOpn64I1-gkHmW7sEPTjFQ-D7Gpe3-KrYWK16u63sVg_lkxE4Y%3D)

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415184/390992598/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=&emci=62afd25d-08a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=594c48cc-24a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219) Dear Friends, As we celebrate Black History Month throughout February, I am thrilled to announce that our very special guest for our first Grassroots Volunteers Update of the 118th Congress will be none other than House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries! Join us on Wednesday, February 8th at 6:45 PM ET / 3:45 PM PT. Register here: [_**https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/7716757959601/WN_WdEquzWkQ5-Tw3iGeX5Ukw**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415185/390992599/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=&emci=62afd25d-08a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=594c48cc-24a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415186/390992600/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=&emci=62afd25d-08a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=594c48cc-24a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)
---

The highest-ranking Democrat in the House and the first African American to lead a party in either chamber of Congress, Leader Jeffries is a proud son of Brooklyn, NY, and a tireless advocate for social and economic justice.
He has devoted himself to helping his constituents and communities across our country recover from the devastation of the COVID-19 pandemic, reforming our criminal justice system, improving the economy for everyday Americans, protecting our healthcare and defending our Democracy.
We will talk about his historic ascent to lead House Democrats’ ongoing work For The People, the progress that we delivered in the 117th Congress working with President Biden and our reflections on the State of the Union. Leader Jeffries will share his priorities for this term and discuss the hard work ahead on key issues impacting the Black Community, including the need for Justice in Policing, protecting voting rights and defending our personal freedoms and Democracy.
Leader Jeffries takes pride in his connection to the families in his District and knows that we can only do so much with our inside maneuvering in the Congress without the passion of our VIPs, our Volunteers in Politics, and their outside mobilization that gets us across the finish line. Our Democratic House Caucus, our party, and the American people are well-served with House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries at the helm for Democrats in the House.
Sign up now!
[_**https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/7716757959601/WN_WdEquzWkQ5-Tw3iGeX5Ukw**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415187/390992601/909662492?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=&emci=62afd25d-08a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=594c48cc-24a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)
NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415188/390992602/1694321165?refcode=footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=)**

**[SHOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58415189/390992603/-1622768287?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRjNDhjYy0yNGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raeqLdwdB8Rv2ss5_n5APqJCCZaAEa-DeIgnmGcfCfU=&emci=62afd25d-08a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=594c48cc-24a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=16320219)**

name: Susan Wild
subject: What do you want to hear from President Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress

body:
We're just a few hours away from President Joe Biden delivering his second State of the Union address. Peter,

We're just a few hours away from President Joe Biden delivering his second State of the Union address where he'll discuss his plans and priorities for the next year. Before he gives his address, we want to hear from you about the issues that are at the top of your mind.

**[Will you take our State of the Union survey and share what issues you'd like to see the Biden administration and Congress work on this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58416101/390996912/-1826660623?ms=em23_230207_sotu2_engg_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&refcode=em23_230207_sotu2_engg_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&source=em23_230207_sotu2_engg_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230207_sotu2_engg_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=GnvblSu11v28B4NN5/ezSLOOj50iwX0btO9aWcTl6VfONt3yuHG8M92IXSa+FYZUWkqQ8kb6+AuAtbUSiO7rrasxKO+F5FwJikSNMm1a8TJAXoZTOw+nbdED7wZTakUYH7Ece7ryE3Cm5MBDOESyTQq6r4X2KA1sC7KkABtrllw=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGM0ZWI2Ni0yYWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rP2gEOHsgJ1oP4uQfKq7BTA4QJHqRnmNTFfpA9y1-U=&emci=d1d7c15d-44a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=70c4eb66-2aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

Team,

On Tuesday, President Joe Biden will deliver his second State of the Union address.

At his address, President Biden will discuss the accomplishments of his term so far – including historic legislation to invest in our infrastructure, reform gun safety laws, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. But, while we've made so much progress over the last two years, we still have a lot of work to do.

From lowering costs to making health care more affordable and defending reproductive rights, Kim is committed to working alongside the Biden administration on the issues that matter most to you. Now, she wants to hear from you.

clean_body: We're just a few hours away from President Joe Biden delivering his second State of the Union address. Peter, We're just a few hours away from President Joe Biden delivering his second State of the Union address where he'll discuss his plans and priorities for the next year. Before he gives his address, we want to hear from you about the issues that are at the top of your mind. \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: State of the Union Survey for you → Date: Saturday, February 4, 2023 Team, On Tuesday, President Joe Biden will deliver his second State of the Union address. At his address, President Biden will discuss the accomplishments of his term so far – including historic legislation to invest in our infrastructure, reform gun safety laws, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. But, while we've made so much progress over the last two years, we still have a lot of work to do. From lowering costs to making health care more affordable and defending reproductive rights, Kim is committed to working alongside the Biden administration on the issues that matter most to you. Now, she wants to hear from you. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

Happy February, folks —

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My guest for the SOTU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Team -

Everyone knows Michigan’s auto workers are the best in the world. As such, I felt it’s only fitting they be represented at tonight’s State of the Union address — though maybe not for reasons you expect.

My guest tonight is Mike Huerta, President of United Auto Workers 602, from the Lansing area. Mike, and all of the other UAW-represented folks that work at GM assembly plants at Delta Township and Grand River, and at the many part supplier factories, are some of the best Michigan has to offer.
But in recent years, Mike and his colleagues have come to represent the face of supply chain issues — and that hasn’t been easy.

Over the last few years, supply chain problems – specifically the microchip shortage – have become a bit of an obsession for me and my teams.
We’ve seen auto plants across the country and in my district close, working on and off because they haven’t been able to get their hands on a 14-cent microchip. For a while, they’d work one week, be off the next, all dependent on whether they got another 100+ microchips to complete a car.

It’s something I hear about every time I’m home – people have literally broken out into chants of “CHIPS! CHIPS! CHIPS!” whenever the topic pops up at my events.

It’s why so many of us fought to get the CHIPS Act over the finish line last summer. It’s a bipartisan bill that provides incentives for companies to manufacture the microchips that power everything – from our cars, to our cell phones, to our dishwashers – right here in the U.S.

Mike in particular has been a vital partner through all of the ups and downs – and explaining what the supply chain problems mean in very human terms. This is why I felt there is no better person to join me for this year’s State of the Union. His leadership and advocacy have exemplified the real world impact of a complicated, often abstract, issue.

I’m hoping that tonight will give us a chance to discuss the benefits we are already seeing from the CHIPS Act — and how to ensure it’s implemented with the spirit with which the bill was passed. We’re at a pivotal moment in our history when the lion share of Americans get that we must bring some critical supply chains home to the US, and I’m looking forward to hearing from President Biden about how we can bring more economic opportunity to Michigan.

Make sure you tune in! Mike and I will be cheering when the topic turns to supply chains!

Elissa

About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

clean_body: Team - Everyone knows Michigan’s auto workers are the best in the world. As such, I felt it’s only fitting they be represented at tonight’s State of the Union address — though maybe not for reasons you expect. My guest tonight is Mike Huerta, President of United Auto Workers 602, from the Lansing area. Mike, and all of the other UAW-represented folks that work at GM assembly plants at Delta Township and Grand River, and at the many part supplier factories, are some of the best Michigan has to offer. But in recent years, Mike and his colleagues have come to represent the face of supply chain issues — and that hasn’t been easy. Over the last few years, supply chain problems – specifically the microchip shortage – have become a bit of an obsession for me and my teams. We’ve seen auto plants across the country and in my district close, working on and off because they haven’t been able to get their hands on a 14-cent microchip. For a while, they’d work one week, be off the next, all dependent on whether they got another 100+ microchips to complete a car. It’s something I hear about every time I’m home – people have literally broken out into chants of “CHIPS! CHIPS! CHIPS!” whenever the topic pops up at my events. It’s why so many of us fought to get the CHIPS Act over the finish line last summer. It’s a bipartisan bill that provides incentives for companies to manufacture the microchips that power everything – from our cars, to our cell phones, to our dishwashers – right here in the U.S. Mike in particular has been a vital partner through all of the ups and downs – and explaining what the supply chain problems mean in very human terms. This is why I felt there is no better person to join me for this year’s State of the Union. His leadership and advocacy have exemplified the real world impact of a complicated, often abstract, issue. I’m hoping that tonight will give us a chance to discuss the benefits we are already seeing from the CHIPS Act — and how to ensure it’s implemented with the spirit with which the bill was passed. We’re at a pivotal moment in our history when the lion share of Americans get that we must bring some critical supply chains home to the US, and I’m looking forward to hearing from President Biden about how we can bring more economic opportunity to Michigan. Make sure you tune in! Mike and I will be cheering when the topic turns to supply chains! CONTRIBUTE [] Elissa [#] About Elissa Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district. Contact Elissa P.O. BOX 4145, EAST LANSING, MI 48826 campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com] [] [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress [] Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress Elissa Slotkin for Congress PO Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826 United States Click here [] to receive fewer emails

As we like to put it at Heritage Action, “Go Woke, Go Broke”! **_Our fight against ESG is making a difference._** We saw record divestment by states from BlackRock last year. CEO Larry Fink even said the company **lost $4 billion due to the conservative backlash against ESG.** That’s all thanks to conservatives like you, Peter. Woke corporations are on defense while Heritage Action and states across the country continue to lead the charge against woke ESG standards. **But we NEED your help to keep up the pressure and help pass laws to block ESG.** **[Peter, we want to expand the fight against ESG massively in 2023. Your crucial donation will help us do it – chip in $20.23 now >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=45f7756595314eab910bb02aed3ab866&_e=hEjfVLw7-XTiuk59dfsNZKQm0LzQBf2ZMTLo9iu4meg3YBP7E1_ftg-0caj0dYdn4bDjnws3GyEA5YpHwScdzmGBPwKskWJzG-7btfPsy2-PxSnpBJ40r9dm283dLxlBKmEn8Y54JCohLnf3E45XmC3l9oEqYLvGGkJAkggocKoZwh9Cuuuq0Kw144C3-EBXJ9F2y7P8eNxJMm7Q71vKKgqyB5UVVAs9G5cvMVQjouY_0bAHv-S5vu_y17eRKUaYZ29fvQvaImxvKGyPAdSvemHHnlnT_0n3dneYuOIwUvG_NWumreZaMGXBfFIPXfb1Wnk29DWObKhL0x1hqMN1F_mSNpwEeoWeIRTmoMbCYDt3l7lYDkbOotZYsqC6Y97q)** Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action

Friend, it's Senator Tim Scott. I've been trying to get a hold of you all week.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Promises Made; Promises Kept
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417354/391002095/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=nOy+acl7NlVOXH8bqHu2xeUxp0EIqOiiGCczCeoQO/sem19Krs8X+D+mLDMxcpdl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZmMjE0Yi0yZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2LtX9GEIm0sqz9uJjiFLJ01lIgbdxTCgYMWrVlQyTI=)

Friend,
Later tonight you're going to hear a lot of spin about the State of the Union after President Biden delivers his address to the American people. But before you are deluged by the spin doctors, I want to take a moment to talk about the progress we have been able to make over the past year thanks to President Biden.
This past year President Biden signed over 250 bills into law. These included legislation to lower Medicare prescription costs for Americans, put our country on track to combat the impact of the climate crisis and shift our economy toward a more sustainable clean energy future.
We not only made important gains in health care and climate policy, we boosted our economy and created a record number of jobs. Today we are seeing the lowest unemployment rate in more than 50 years — and last year was the second-best year ever for job growth in America. As President, Joe Biden oversaw an economy that added 4.3 million jobs! Nothing to sneeze at!
Joe Biden also finally put to rest the old joke about the 'infrastructure week' that never launched. As a result of the 2021 infrastructure bill this year we saw states and municipalities across the country investing in better roads and bridges, stronger transit, modernized airports and ports and affordable accessible high-speed internet.
We also worked with the President to address our democratic deficits — confirming over 100 judges to the federal bench, passing the Respect for Marriage Act and protecting marriages from discrimination on the basis of sex, race, or ethnicity. And, while it fell short of what we would have wished for, we passed the first federal gun safety legislation in decades.
I don't need to tell you how tough it can be to make progress in this divided political atmosphere. That makes these accomplishments even more noteworthy.
[**Click below to join me in thanking President Biden for a job well done!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417355/391002096/748549925?refcode=&refcode2=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=nOy+acl7NlVOXH8bqHu2xeUxp0EIqOiiGCczCeoQO/sem19Krs8X+D+mLDMxcpdl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZmMjE0Yi0yZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2LtX9GEIm0sqz9uJjiFLJ01lIgbdxTCgYMWrVlQyTI=&emci=b3d1c8ce-28a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)
****[THANK YOU!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417356/391002097/748549925?refcode=&refcode2=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=nOy+acl7NlVOXH8bqHu2xeUxp0EIqOiiGCczCeoQO/sem19Krs8X+D+mLDMxcpdl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZmMjE0Yi0yZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2LtX9GEIm0sqz9uJjiFLJ01lIgbdxTCgYMWrVlQyTI=&emci=b3d1c8ce-28a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)****
We have our work cut out for us now that Republicans control the House of Representatives. But tonight let's celebrate all that we have accomplished together this past year. We have the power to do so much more if we keep working together.
Onwards,
Chris

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord St. Ste 202
Kensington, MD 20895
[www.vanhollen.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417357/391002098/-1239931627?refcode=em230207SOTU&refcode2=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=nOy+acl7NlVOXH8bqHu2xeUxp0EIqOiiGCczCeoQO/sem19Krs8X+D+mLDMxcpdl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDZmMjE0Yi0yZmE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2LtX9GEIm0sqz9uJjiFLJ01lIgbdxTCgYMWrVlQyTI=&emci=b3d1c8ce-28a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=d46f214b-2fa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: lies, cries and alibis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
The state of Joe Biden’s presidency | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Tonight, Joe Biden is going to address Congress and the American people.

Like his predecessors, he will likely include the following phrase in his speech: “the state of our union is strong.”

_But is that the case?_

With Joe Biden at the helm, our border has gone to hell, our economy is crumbling, crime is rising and he just can’t seem to get his head on straight.

This president has spent more time covering for the alleged crimes of his son, hiding from his scandals and giving the Woke Mob every single one of their wishes than he has actually working to serve the American people. **[Our country deserves leaders that will put their own self interest aside and do what is best for the nation.](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=d1334ba7f1124e6295fba80c72432c75&_e=JnQ0AbPZLaa1Ec6KsaNiL5dUSw2ZmGA_0lZGwfSZ3ZZuY85JB1qRPoJGs3RnBND409vmWwlQv3r4Iy5HW46c0odL2rGpjr8PTUQOkogddQM3lPvPTo_gbDN-uIPnnh8mwiIMhzKzPLWbPcGkMc_V7PnAdhTFjtB7iaWOEh52Q0dd4jHgQWroMKkEU5bKxvd2_sv8UM9GAI4jetmRbQJlzS6TnYda7915iAlFHz5sHcYvovXdy7t7vOEXYEyp1OVWscMT6GHNQeolb9eDUzZhx7GLIFUbMMTP7LXTJz83tA0hxNCo1jJqU1guCxE8yYhxRQB_NXvoSOHJkXIOI_tghR1ml16SLdDrhNYqZrOSEnczMAfDDPQY4AVYlE8kySJX9B-Y9zTwq8FQQDIwYAdpkA%3D%3D)**
For decades, Joe Biden has proven that he is incapable of doing that.

Instead, he has used his career in politics as a way to gain money, power and fame for him and his family. But I say enough is enough.

We will not buy into the lies, cries and alibis that Joe Biden is bound to spew tonight. The American people know better than to take this president at his word.

It’s time that we band together as America First Conservatives and fight to save our country from the Radical bad actors working to tear it apart.
---
[**STOP JOE BIDEN AND THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=d1334ba7f1124e6295fba80c72432c75&_e=JnQ0AbPZLaa1Ec6KsaNiL5dUSw2ZmGA_0lZGwfSZ3ZZuY85JB1qRPoJGs3RnBND409vmWwlQv3r4Iy5HW46c0odL2rGpjr8PTUQOkogddQM3lPvPTo_gbDN-uIPnnh8mwiIMhzKzPLWbPcGkMc_V7PnAdhTFjtB7iaWOEh52Q0dd4jHgQWroMKkEU5bKxvd2_sv8UM9GAI4jetmRbQJlzS6TnYda7915iAlFHz5sHcYvovXdy7t7vOEXYEyp1OVWsJJ6nbeuxAXna0sDXAzeeihCc7XLjkADZfu8F4hurozn3uPl5BF53grYkMX2UAS5K0QSfUX59XS_mdrg3CCK5rx_XH76MbUF_u4hZcQb6BjyrVF50yqWMUQgPkAq-ldcgde2ZpYZO910bplhOIKvgg%3D%3D)
---
Thank you for continuing to do what’s right,

Patrick Morrisey

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? body:
What do you hope to hear from President Biden at tonight's State of the Union?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417610/391003114/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230207SURV_N_RR_FULL_4_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDY4MmVhZS0zMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUhhkGZIZhlEXlUuHOYssjRM3U-LrxXeT48FmTYVgkg=)
---
In just a few hours, President Biden will speak to Congress for his third State of the Union address.

He has a lot of accomplishments to be proud of. He's signed into law historic infrastructure and climate bills, as well as legislation to codify same-sex marriage around the country. He's overseen an incredible amount of job growth (just last week, we learned that unemployment is at its lowest since the first moon landing), and he's spoken powerfully in the face of extremism and election denialism.

But the work continues, and there is much more progress that we must keep fighting for. Jennifer hopes that President Biden will speak tonight to all that makes our union strong — and all we can do to make it even stronger.

[**We want to know what YOU want to hear from President Biden tonight. Will you take our one-question survey before 8:30 PM? Your responses are always valuable as Jennifer works to craft a message that mobilizes voters all across her swing district.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417611/391003115/1550362310?ms=EM_PET_230207SURV_N_RR_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230207SURV_N_RR_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDY4MmVhZS0zMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUhhkGZIZhlEXlUuHOYssjRM3U-LrxXeT48FmTYVgkg=&emci=e4e85bca-2aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=14682eae-30a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58417612/391003116/1550362310?ms=EM_PET_230207SURV_N_RR_FULL_4_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230207SURV_N_RR_FULL_4_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDY4MmVhZS0zMGE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fUhhkGZIZhlEXlUuHOYssjRM3U-LrxXeT48FmTYVgkg=&emci=e4e85bca-2aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=14682eae-30a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Thank you!

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Fellow conservative,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It's the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won't stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I'll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they'll take away my parking spot, next? body:
We’ll be watching to see what Joe Biden says tomorrow night, but we’ll also be playing along, too.
Fellow American - are you ready for Joe Biden's State of the Union?

We can't imagine all the whacky things that will come out of Joe Biden's month - but we tried.

That's why we created our very own BINGO card for the SOTU. We'll watch Joe Biden address the nation - and cross off anything on our board.

subject: Was your life better before Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
State of the Union

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d36ebf79bcb942f3ba2195022ec07507&_e=Yh2Szh4ty8ZLMMtTLErqsl4m-0wtxeN3klXJO5z745dWBVknCeBeJpFplmGnRpxNZjyBkwIG8p32uRiBtJ2VNWbrf2tT5z5b-LJkLuj-gDhlv8tnr7q-pmhj_A1lU7HDmGkGJk7Tm3YrinPytBdP4ndviNrEzwgB6O7Zk9le5z2XI60_2P-en5Nd3XbWrJ-FFMuw5zLL0EjbpTHT9EtJJNtdT3XKiBdRq7wpFTheW4oO0wRHlp-JlQMXlP7rsMAlBXiq36PPXIV39GlEyFWdVSo69RB0wx3bcl7Fae4QizVHFTEJ12v4ul15EtFxMiGG5_tagZ4BpxZvVqOO39QRZzJ_-1fUrAOOkvfIFvrodkUIA5FcEApJptEXbY0A9f976k7kxsAcpwIxHaH6D8LdiWCvu5lSj_H_9kS8XmWukiAoqG2H8MRTUrlgMGsvS-Z6hsA-G954jX_V-F2UxYrawcaUIeY2YDHXouE-mVaCVlGFsZxFIm7zkj6HdbX0NpV5WSJB9TkxbbTtxsPNvfVao6v6QK8r3o9XDjdXSiObRsSOmN7gQTl6g4Zs3yD88jHHvonke6jAnQcStibEZeT8Gw%3D%3D)
---
Friends,

Tonight, Joe Biden will deliver his third State of the Union speech.

This will be his first State of the Union address in a divided Congress.

We have one simple question for you. _Are you better off now than you were before Biden took office?_

President Biden's failures have put the state of the union in jeopardy. Now is our chance to turn things around for the better.

clean_body: State of the Union | Friends, Tonight, Joe Biden will deliver his third State of the Union speech. This will be his first State of the Union address in a divided Congress. We have one simple question for you. Are you better off now than you were before Biden took office? President Biden's failures have put the state of the union in jeopardy. Now is our chance to turn things around for the better. We will need all of the help we can get as we take on a dangerous threat to our republic: the Radical Left. The only thing that can save us is Republican leadership in 2023. | God bless, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. name: Wisconsin Election Alert (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
subject: The election that could change abortion access in WI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Peter — The stakes of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election in April of this year could not be higher: **Abortion access, gerrymandering, and voting rights are all on the line, and voters will be casting ballots in just a few short months.** This election is getting national attention — the _New York Times_ recently wrote that this race continues the non-stop political spotlight on Wisconsin. Outside groups are certainly going to spend big on this election, and far-right organizations will stop at nothing to help the conservative candidates in this race. Tammy is prioritizing voter turnout in this important April election (and the February 21 primary!). Every voter’s voice should be heard, especially in an election where the stakes are this high. **While all eyes are on Wisconsin, can you chip in to help Tammy’s get-out-the-vote efforts? clean_body: | Peter — The stakes of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election in April of this year could not be higher: Abortion access, gerrymandering, and voting rights are all on the line, and voters will be casting ballots in just a few short months. This election is getting national attention — the New York Times recently wrote that this race continues the non-stop political spotlight on Wisconsin. Outside groups are certainly going to spend big on this election, and far-right organizations will stop at nothing to help the conservative candidates in this race. Tammy is prioritizing voter turnout in this important April election (and the February 21 primary!). Every voter’s voice should be heard, especially in an election where the stakes are this high. While all eyes are on Wisconsin, can you chip in to help Tammy’s get-out-the-vote efforts? name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I'm giving the State of the Union rebuttal but I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I'm giving the State of the Union response tonight, but I need your help.

Joe Biden and his far-left allies have set us down a dangerous path of destructive Democrat policies and unmitigated disasters. There is a LOT going on that I could address, but I need to know which issues matter most to YOU.

The only way to truly know the state of the union is by going directly to the voices that matter most - yours.

Will you please take 30 seconds to send me your TOP concerns?

I really need your input before I take the stage tonight. It would really mean a lot to me and to the country to know that my speech and concerns are coming directly from YOU.

Please respond here ASAP so I have time to read through it all!

---
| | [RESPOND NOW](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=412b19fd1f514e929638d82dd4fdbe82&_e=sMP3HkFCAW9PFcTOPAg07V_8rszcpYClvEfznOaMmJ45XWQ0DJEFl7hrBtEwk-62KA2UZ9j2uRla0eZdvYAqlDfDDVYe7rZtbt_A7VygspFXS3OK56q93ci723U-47HolV633fxkPsVcIFmdzdcUpY_hf1Dh_TXQ-t549E_Fa_99h6iYRt4CkATuChV2LWiBPxAOBsWnXCmLr3jNNbpm0ezRmtFeGD_i1-hOuJzuNMMLkCLxfJqtLCVnnxt0eY6lOfBPhi5BIRaDHSLHz2J1elaXH5YFfxnvd4aw4bZmT3U2M-foFkGf5y7ifud7lxeMwBjFg10J89Tg5fMDX_R_5foB-K7XbjQdsZ8NjTNhcNZlc88RWjFRMtNF3I0qKED6)

Thank you for your input!

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdZ2Y4Vq9HJzGA-SQQsW21eFOIbIIIGzkPxTMCQ660gUodJt_Xig92J0TludVT6uIgcKKyChIWyY-hs5V6tpJzXIYRvs2nMisoVz7-kY2lEbjLgbG7kdjr4_kIm_kY7nDbWKoDHjYsM2RnDKeTNEPTQCV832ofuU1CdzmJ9Z3qotT)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdRxDq7FQqi1PjxUaRfPcFAxmW_v0JdxaNpWl0eRSTblYS0nVsTusyeZslPeG0Co-Nf19yBgz1bYjE2UfJ9CyXa3mkn-7UtBe7kOH-xeXs21YtTMwzqhPeqgQDqjYTiwthRL4YVMMn98wRXzqIUloaThqKjlwIzxbihW-7clW49Wk)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdbPC09-25bM63m49Ui2-j3VmF7JHvAwg2s1dyWq6B9yFfng-HTykuHofNKJ4OwJgmzJWVsSJeztSC8U_gZDdo1URsfSez0Np_mATfGtwwufidIeRCdurdYldj8IZ2fR53hGUE-kf5Ips9LcZgajynGqgRImbSPcFggmlpf_pXt71)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdYUx-upeM8a_RKE1FtqRzYgpq4DAgml8FADL7Piez3RWxeojyihm6a1NLN6wEYsa2TvIDnqlKpQhtnfP9VQs9RHbxPKpamrKuAnDLUGLlPSlGHqHuS9gL6cPiTbaXAfT83-mdQ8EwVsX2dmugKUNfdDAdyJ_GrQ5p8HLKwDxiCzL)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdc0oLjLQVh7JXaOQs0hKpskLXc7YeoW3ToU7tvqhuovbXhefLEUPLxGvQASfsLKAh1fX6RIvUEVSXPxJW-vZ0CuSw6tvMOOg8-Y1de-oiRxKfqDl2Gx3Mh2zuwXzG4wIk2Be8ih5QmD13tZmACz15d8puMrB01a4d0WjWe_PY4hf)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdSlebcAguHweT3wlVbV6X2hWIwhm2SI6uPjfgI9SvBUXLxopRHk6M6y5feOdj2uQsmW0o80gJZBLPuYXerJakNJwYr0PbAL4ssqMCqNTr0x2Ii6KP9VCo14ZzsgLduJgRFPbZaoNmop5GqSmJ178raY0o7PSOhVmkTee_E0chi4K) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdQ_myGC5pG-Zjix1qGCbV8sEn9Aa-FjZmCbPVkZzi_wQMNnjo10MppbXLueBz356nKC1nxCVXDgjY3ZpnoYoLHR_z42aUPAmCGh8hQnkcND_ltomVtfRMKLQdWR8kfV9x2hIQ8yePwVL3Vih-GfIMSJemi4UsJIZofsINotm2Vf-)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2f0859fd5f74b80ae9ab685cc70d4f0&_e=Ot-xG0xzXrWPCWxER6Nii7IQfdeCNqXoqfBUBQ5wIgs-Ic4_s6tZsdxxYHujyNC5kl-Sz1YWtPSDWbvO-EelW539a_nEKkRUxzZ9x2R4SjqsvhgqKXOURm8fhTDETedE9VyGRwkCxb34D7WGiKQbdY2kTvMP3exipfzZlorUmgPzlr7R2aA99P0DFo9CnbwIVdnQvyCbeYdk0DBqiiayChlcuKBn0poqAtARMNTxHcRRR6HxIE_iTfFb1mLaMP_a_EYHlF55s19X6eVJm5LJnJ4AJ5Pms7THb0vhwwg4Ct1g1ngmmj4NQpC2wbic654k) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

| Friend,

Since this new year started, I have been grateful to reflect on our past term in the Council and our accomplishments since 2018 and beyond. I have been in hearings, at rallies, passing legislation, and in our community spending time with allies and neighbors building on ideas and the solutions we have implemented to improve our city. body:
This Republican Supreme Court’s decision is appalling.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58419185/391009017/823540626?refcode=ea.9640888f-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9640888f-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwODg4Zi0zYWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-Ncs4UhMFTof3OXiCqctzCmH-dGGcllbnBF8hJxWJ0=&emci=5818e0df-32a7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9640888f-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**NC STATE SUPREME COURT BOWS TO POLITICAL PRESSURE** _Right-wing majority agrees to reopen critical rulings_
* * *
Peter — The new GOP majority of our state Supreme Court just agreed to rehear critical cases decided only months ago under previous justices. The cases in question notably struck down Republicans’ anti-voter legislation and ultra-gerrymandered legislative district maps. _It’s an appalling, unprecedented reversal of precedent, and clearly politically motivated._ **The right-wing Court is bowing to pressure from Republican legislators to undo those decisions — and presumably provide new outcomes more favorable to the GOP.** **[I’m going to use every power at my disposal to fight back, but we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us. I need you to donate anything you can right now to take a stand against the far-right takeover of the judiciary>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58419186/391009018/435245919?refcode=ea.9640888f-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.9640888f-3aa7-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjQwODg4Zi0zYWE3LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-Ncs4UhMFTof3OXiCqctzCmH-dGGcllbnBF8hJxWJ0=)** Peter, the Republican legislature intends to undermine our state constitution and create a judiciary subservient to their political ideology — and their efforts are already paying off. It’s clear that these justices reject the idea of an independent judiciary and swear allegiance to the whims of the Republican legislative leadership. That isn’t how our judicial system is supposed to work, and it’s putting our democracy itself at risk. After the Court issues its rulings, we’ll need to be prepared for the GOP to have a massive advantage in elections to come. We can only take them on if we build up our strength NOW. **[I’m asking you to pitch in right away — $5, $25, or anything you can — to ensure NC Democrats have the resources we need to win a rigged game. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81baddf1bba54a1790d4a23dfecc4d2c&_e=QIMwPlpJuTUmeddtnts5hv3V3igFqVC8iemUxMGfzntcgDkNBOmvY0RoFGZJ9xmX-ONbNrf9JVUpf_t47ZJFn5Z7Z_T6j3wlQO_D6MT56-9Z0KfOb-7z_1xu9Y3zxoqUGhwKKbsJjC4XZXxCMxMtjIUO4wFGA3-4afkwchDa42o1YA5R-EBcPTuzh8JYTCzxzXXHzke_zWDSOhDyibvq4aqCIYZvFza5LqaxqhmOZyI5YyzunLEEvmDKgdMWhKIgGeBqJmEFdq6IR9ZjeeqSr_EhOwZK-2Lw_HdI47Zjqew%3D)

[Get your book now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81baddf1bba54a1790d4a23dfecc4d2c&_e=QIMwPlpJuTUmeddtnts5hv3V3igFqVC8iemUxMGfzntcgDkNBOmvY0RoFGZJ9xmX-ONbNrf9JVUpf_t47ZJFn5Z7Z_T6j3wlQO_D6MT56-9Z0KfOb-7z_1xu9Y3zxoqUGhwKKbsJjC4XZXxCMxMtjOvTxXwNwvB232ucbWj4KOHllrAAHDKBV-6Jw6YN26A3QXkTwLNeg0U2KIOpSsn6lBCZcLUxFjoZfvv-rq4PpSAWArAYJv89GYxxv8A9lmgxs-zs53Gl4nnCQJyLUQyolvcXa4TTV5I-I4SSL3RplaY%3D)

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?DNC=20Community=20Engagement?=
subject: State of the Union Toolkit and Resources
body:
Please watch and amplify as President Joe Biden makes his State of the Union address. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1628e5d5dbfb/state-of-the-union-toolkit-and-resources?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | |
---
| | | **TONIGHT: PRESIDENT BIDEN GIVES THE STATE OF THE UNION

The 2023 State of the Union Address will be given by President Joe Biden, on February 7, 2023 at 9:00 p.m. ET.** To help us maximize the impact of this event, we have created this toolkit with tips on how you can help amplify this moment and the president’s message to the country.

The State of the Union will air live on **February 7, 2023 at 9:00 p.m. ET** on all major broadcast and cable news networks. You can also stream the event live on the official [White House YouTube page](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f6f4526394&e=d6c5c7d7ec). **AMPLIFY THE SPEECH ON SOCIAL MEDIA** During the event, official Democratic Party social media accounts will be live posting highlights and talking points from the president’s message that will need amplification and engagement (i.e. likes, comments, retweets, shares, etc.). To ensure you don’t miss any of the content that is coming out, please follow all of our accounts ahead of the SOTU and be prepared to monitor them while the event is taking place. Amplifying this content will help validate the president’s message as relevant for your respective caucus/council. These platforms are a great place to easily connect with not only family and friends but also colleagues and members of your caucus or council. You can add individuals from your social network to a direct message thread where everyone can share and amplify relevant SOTU content coming from accounts they are following. Each person can be assigned an account to monitor and share content/information back with the rest of the group. Accounts to follow and amplify:

name: Pfizer Mutating Viruses?
subject: We The People Demand Answers
body:
Is Pfizer Mutating Viruses?
===========================

Hundreds of Patriots demanded answers yesterday outside of
-----------------------------------------------------------

Pfizer headquarters in Portage, MI
----------------------------------

The U.S.-based Project Veritas' sting video on Pfizer's top research executive claiming the company is mutating the Covid-19 virus has exploded on social media (over 30 million views on Twitter), prompting the New York-based pharmaceutical company to come up with an explanation on the issue by denying the claims made in the hugely viral video.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In the sting operation video released by Project Veritas, one Jordon Trishton Walker, Pfizer’s director of research & development -- strategic operations and mRNA scientific planning, is seen saying the company is exploring ways to make sure the Covid-19 virus "keeps mutating" and that how the company can "mutate it ourselves" to "preemptively" develop new vaccines.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Allegations have recently been made related to the “gain of function and directed evolution research” at Pfizer and the company would like to set the record straight, says Pfizer.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The company, which is one of the top vaccine makers in the world, said in the "ongoing development of the Pfizer-BioNTech mRNA COVID-19 vaccine, Pfizer has not conducted “gain of function or directed evolution research". In clinical research, the term “gain of function” is defined as the alteration of genotypes and their resulting phenotypes.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On the speculations of Pfizer doing research on "mutating the virus", the company clarified: "We have conducted a research where the original SARS-CoV-2 virus has been used to express the spike protein from new variants of concern. This work is undertaken once a new variant of concern has been identified by public health authorities. This research provides a way for us to rapidly assess the ability of an existing vaccine to induce antibodies that neutralise a newly identified variant of concern. We then make this data available through peer-reviewed scientific journals and use it as one of the steps to determine whether a vaccine update is required."
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The explosive allegations in the video have, meanwhile, sent Pfizer stock plunging, with the shares falling 3.11% in the past week. Notably, this is the second time Pfizer has courted controversy in recent weeks. During the WEF 2023 summit in January, its CEO Albert Bourla was confronted by a journalist, who asked him a series of tough questions on the efficacy of the company's Covid vaccine. However, despite strong nudging, Bourla can be seen avoiding all questions in the viral video.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-Reported By Fortune India

[Watch my interview with State Rep Angela Rigas who spoke at the protest.CLICK HERE](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/A3-RWIJd4J91FCeMNB9Zq8OAKNuzB1clKUBoB6MS80mxoZidgzTQruiwq7N757HQlfUanpTXetcG1b4fK1LoI0ZKq8XazRncSLEjK9T00v9PPwdX5LU870hyu1yE5WCKIAI1nZWxsN8HixqIxIvf6o2jPc-iVyvumRvrKD9TNEZrgE8t0yhNl_ZEv5PAEowsZ1YrHjik)

Grassroots Army Merch Store is open until Feb 14th.
---------------------------------------------------

Click on picture below to shop.
-------------------------------

ORDER NOW!
==========

You know me folks,
-------------------

I WON'T BACK DOWN
-----------------

I will continue to do EVERYTHING in my power to keep you updated on the fight.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

God bless You,
--------------

God Bless the State of Michigan and
-----------------------------------

God Bless These United States!
------------------------------

-Garrett Soldano
----------------

**Grassroots Army**

8357 Barony Pt, 49071, Mattawan

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Kevin McCarthy here. I'll keep this huddle brief. Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - but if we miss our critical fundraising deadline we are going to fail. The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans today to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown. I'm only sending this hail mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the endzone. It 's game over without you. It's all up to you. If you ignore our pleas and drop the ball, then our chances of stopping Biden and Schumer's radical agenda are gone. Can you rush $8 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the left in their tracks? | | | | | | | | House GOP's Commitment to America | ✅ Rein in the IRS ✅ Secure the Border ✅ Fund the Police ✅ Unleash American Energy ✅ Secure our Elections ✅ Curb Inflation & Spending ✅Pass the Parents Bill of Rights ✅Hold Joe Biden Accountable ARE YOU IN?** | | | | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Here’s where our candidate recruitment stands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Back in December, we launched our candidate recruitment to search for the
next teachers, nurses, bartenders, and community organizers who will
become Justice Democrats and join the Squad in Congress.

As we’ve dug into the data, our target districts and incumbents are
becoming more clear. We’re zeroing in on the representatives who are out
of touch with their constituents and out of time to do better.

We’re working round the clock to identify diverse, working class leaders
who are already fighting for their communities — so they can join our
slate of candidates and take on the political establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126479?refcode=em20230207-27436&t=1001&akid=27436%2E1203867%2EtT8szo ]Can you chip in $3 or more as we move into the next phase
of our candidate recruitment? Your donation funds all of the work we’re
doing on the ground to find the next Justice Democrats.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126479?refcode=em20230207-27436&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27436%2E1203867%2EtT8szo ]Contribute $3

Here’s what’s shocking: the overwhelming majority of Democratic incumbents
still take corporate money. And many oppose Medicare for All and a Green
New Deal — policies that are not only necessary to address the crises
we’re facing, but popular.

If we want to move the Democratic Party forward, we have to start by
supporting primary challenges to complacent, corporate-backed incumbents
who are stalling progress — even if it means upsetting the political
establishment.

So here’s our next challenge: Finding the right candidates. We’re looking
to recruit working class, progressive leaders who will fight for their
communities in Congress — people like Summer Lee, Cori Bush, or AOC.

Our candidates are our superpower. Even when party leadership blacklists
us, incumbents smear us, and far-right organizations like AIPAC spend
millions against us, we win because our candidates truly represent the
people — and it shows.

We’ve already begun conversations with some potential candidates in our
target districts, but this process takes a lot of time, work, and
resources to get right. That’s why your help at this turning point is
critical for our success.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126479?refcode=em20230207-27436&t=1021&akid=27436%2E1203867%2EtT8szo ]We’re relying on your support to power our ongoing candidate
recruitment — Peter,
can I count on your $3
donation today?

Thank you so much for your support,

Geoff Simpson

Campaigns Director, Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230207-27436-footer&t=1022&refcode2=27436_1203867_tT8szo&akid=27436%2E1203867%2EtT8szo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=27436%2E1203867%2EtT8szo

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

And many oppose Medicare for All and a Green New Deal — policies that are not only necessary to address the crises we’re facing, but popular. If we want to move the Democratic Party forward, we have to start by supporting primary challenges to complacent, corporate-backed incumbents who are stalling progress — even if it means upsetting the political establishment. So here’s our next challenge: Finding the right candidates. We’re looking to recruit working class, progressive leaders who will fight for their communities in Congress — people like Summer Lee, Cori Bush, or AOC. Our candidates are our superpower. Even when party leadership blacklists us, incumbents smear us, and far-right organizations like AIPAC spend millions against us, we win because our candidates truly represent the people — and it shows. We’ve already begun conversations with some potential candidates in our target districts, but this process takes a lot of time, work, and resources to get right. That’s why your help at this turning point is critical for our success. [ ]We’re relying on your support to power our ongoing candidate recruitment — Peter, can I count on your $3 donation today? Thank you so much for your support, Geoff Simpson Campaigns Director, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

clean_body: Take action now | Fellow Americans, As we prepare to hear President Biden's State of the Union address, I want to take a moment to reflect on the state of our nation. Since President Biden took office, our country has been suffering. We have seen a dramatic increase in taxes, a decrease in jobs, and a rise in crime. This administration has eroded our freedoms and crippled our economy. | It is time for us to take action and save America. We need to elect leaders who will fight for our freedoms and values and put the American people first. We need to elect leaders who will reduce taxes, create jobs, and protect our American way of life. We need to elect leaders who will stand up for the American people, fight for the values that make our country great, put America first, and ensure our nation is strong and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | | I am running for Senate because I will continue to be a leader fighting to protect our freedom and ensure our economy is strong. God Bless You, and God Bless America, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties.
